analysis_summary.zh:
【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市环境（1D RSI均低于50），但价格与SMA50偏离度不大（-0.31%至-1.27%），显示下跌动能有限。宏观上美联储鹰派（利率预期上升）与VIX恐慌指数高位（27.54）构成压制，但美元指数走强（99.69）尚未引发全面抛售。价格对负面数据（如ETH/SOL鲸鱼抛售）反应平淡，呈现‘坏消息不跌’的隐藏吸筹特征。
【决策依据详情】Qlib排名显示BNB相对最强（得分0.0005），但技术面普遍疲软（RSI 38-44，ADX 15-22）。关键数据：ETH爆仓多空比7.05、DOGE爆仓多空比19.67，显示多头正承受巨大强平压力；ETH/SOL鲸鱼代币流向为负（24h净流入交易所），但价格未破位，暗示抛压可能被吸收。
【痛苦交易】最痛苦方为多头：ETH、DOGE、BNB的爆仓多空比均远高于1（7.05、19.67、9.40），且持仓L/S比显示散户多头拥挤（DOGE账户数比1.79）。若价格小幅下跌，可能触发连锁强平，形成‘多头挤压陷阱’。
【剧本选择】选择‘均值回归’剧本，原因：1）技术面超卖（RSI接近40），但下跌动能不足（ADX低）；2）鲸鱼流向与价格背离（ETH/SOL抛售但价格横盘），暗示潜在反转；3）高爆仓多空比意味着空头获利丰厚，容易平仓引发反弹。
analysis_summary.en:
Narrative Synthesis: Market is in bearish regime (1D RSI <50) but price deviations from SMA50 are small (-0.31% to -1.27%), indicating limited downside momentum. Macro headwinds (Fed hawkish, VIX high) are present but DXY strength hasn't triggered full sell-off. Price shows resilience to negative data (e.g., ETH/SOL whale selling), suggesting hidden accumulation.
Decision Details: Qlib ranks BNB strongest (score 0.0005) but technicals are weak (RSI 38-44, ADX 15-22). Key metrics: ETH liquidation ratio 7.05, DOGE 19.67 show longs under severe pressure; ETH/SOL whale token flow negative (to exchange) but price holds, implying selling absorbed.
Pain Trade: Longs are most trapped: ETH, DOGE, BNB have high liquidation ratios (>7), and retail long crowding (DOGE account ratio 1.79). A minor drop could trigger cascading liquidations, creating a 'long squeeze trap'.
Scenario Selection: Chose 'Mean Reversion' because: 1) Oversold technicals (RSI near 40) with weak momentum (low ADX); 2) Whale flow-price divergence (selling but price sideways) hints reversal; 3) High liquidation ratios mean shorts are profitable and prone to cover, sparking bounce.

red_team_audit.zh: 【强制红军审计】如果判断错误，最可能原因是：1）鲸鱼持续抛售（ETH/SOL 24h净流出交易所）可能代表机构看跌，而非吸筹；2）宏观恶化（美联储更鹰派）可能压倒技术面反弹；3）高爆仓多空比可能继续恶化，引发多头踩踏而非反转。数据支撑反面结论：ETH资金费率仍为正（0.0100%），显示杠杆多头未完全投降；BTC/ETH持仓量增加（OI变化+1.55%/+4.41%）暗示新空头入场，可能延续跌势。
red_team_audit.en: Forced Contra-Argument: If thesis is wrong, most likely because: 1) Whale selling (ETH/SOL net to exchange) could indicate institutional bearishness, not accumulation; 2) Macro worsening (more hawkish Fed) may overwhelm technical bounce; 3) High liquidation ratios could worsen, triggering long capitulation not reversal. Data for opposite view: ETH funding positive (0.0100%) shows leveraged longs not fully gone; BTC/ETH OI rising (+1.55%/+4.41%) suggests new shorts entering, potentially extending decline.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 【冲突信号】最明显风险：1）Qlib排名第一的BNB得分仅0.0005，信号微弱；2）ETH/SOL鲸鱼资金流向也为负（稳定币流出），可能预示资金离场而非抄底；3）全市场趋势为熊市（1D环境BEAR）。解释：微弱Qlib信号意味着趋势动能不足，支持均值回归；鲸鱼资金流出但代币抛售同时发生，可能只是短期调仓；熊市环境但价格横盘，显示卖压衰竭。
contrary_signal_check.en: List the most significant contrary signal or risk point and justify why it doesn't invalidate the trade: Top risks: 1) BNB Qlib score only 0.0005, weak signal; 2) ETH/SOL whale stablecoin flow also negative (outflow), suggesting capital exit not buying; 3) Overall market trend bearish (1D BEAR). Justification: Weak Qlib supports mean reversion over trend; whale outflows with token selling may be short-term rebalancing; bearish trend but price sideways indicates selling exhaustion.

technical_signal.zh: 【技术信号】上/下影线比率：ETH下影线12% > 上影线7%，SOL下影线26% > 上影线1%，显示下方买盘支撑较强。RSI与ADX状态：普遍RSI 38-44（超卖区域），ADX 15-22（趋势弱），符合盘整特征。价格与均线偏离度：所有币种价格低于SMA50，偏离度-0.31%至-1.27%，跌幅温和。
technical_signal.en: Technical Signal: Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: ETH lower wick 12% > upper 7%, SOL lower 26% > upper 1%, indicating strong buying support below. RSI & ADX status: RSI 38-44 (oversold), ADX 15-22 (weak trend), consistent with consolidation. SMA deviation: All coins below SMA50, deviation -0.31% to -1.27%, mild decline.

macro_onchain.zh: 【宏观链上】24小时强平数据：多单爆仓显著高于空单（ETH多空比7.05，DOGE 19.67），多头痛苦。巨鲸资金流向：ETH/SOL代币净流向为负（充币抛售），稳定币净流向也为负（资金离场）。资金费率状态：BTC/ETH为正（0.0100%/0.0092%），SOL/BNB/DOGE为负（-0.0131%至-0.0002%），分化显示局部挤压风险。
macro_onchain.en: Macro On-Chain: 24h Liquidation Data: Long liquidation much higher than short (ETH ratio 7.05, DOGE 19.67), longs in pain. Whale Net Flow: ETH/SOL token flow negative (to exchange), stablecoin flow also negative (capital out). Funding Rate: BTC/ETH positive (0.0100%/0.0092%), SOL/BNB/DOGE negative (-0.0131% to -0.0002%), divergence indicates local squeeze risks.

quantitative_analysis.zh: 【量化分析】Qlib排名：BNB第一（得分0.0005），但分数接近零，显著性低；DOGE第二（-0.0003），BTC/ETH最弱（-0.0009）。量价偏差：SOL资金费率Z-Score -135.31%极端负值，但价格未大跌，可能超卖；ETH资金费率Z-Score +175.69%极端正值，结合高爆仓比，风险高。
quantitative_analysis.en: Quantitative Analysis: Qlib ranking: BNB top (score 0.0005) but near zero, low significance; DOGE second (-0.0003), BTC/ETH weakest (-0.0009). Vol/Price deviations: SOL funding Z-Score -135.31% extreme negative but price not crashing, possibly oversold; ETH funding Z-Score +175.69% extreme positive with high liquidation ratio, high risk.

regime_safety.zh: 【安全评估】基于痛苦交易：RSI超卖（38-44）、ADX弱（15-22）、NATR中等（1.34%-2.14%）；上/下影线比率显示买盘支撑；爆仓多空比极高（ETH 7.05, DOGE 19.67）；鲸鱼净流向为负（抛售）。结论：‘安全均值回归’（SAFE_MR），依据：技术超卖、高爆仓比暗示反转潜力、鲸鱼抛售但价格横盘可能为最后一跌。
regime_safety.en: Regime Safety: Based on Pain Trade: RSI oversold (38-44), ADX weak (15-22), NATR medium (1.34%-2.14%); Wick ratio shows buying support; Liquidation ratios very high (ETH 7.05, DOGE 19.67); Whale net flow negative (selling). Verdict: 'SAFE_MR' (Safe Mean Reversion) because: technicals oversold, high liquidation ratios hint reversal potential, whale selling with price sideways may be final washout.

【剧本选择】选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因多个资产（DOGE、BNB、ETH）出现极端爆仓多空比和拥挤交易，技术面RSI处于40-50超卖区域，价格偏离SMA50负向，存在反弹修复机会。

1. [Narrative Validation]: Market is in bearish regime (1D RSI <50) but long-term trend bullish (price > SMA50). Macro shows Fed hawkishness and high VIX, reducing risk appetite. Price action lacks new drivers, indicating momentum exhaustion.

ETH whale token flow +207,205.9 ETH (withdrawal) but stablecoin outflow $6.5M indicates capital leaving. analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于中性震荡，宏观背景偏鹰派（美联储利率预期上升，VIX恐慌指数走高），但价格未出现恐慌性下跌，显示抛压有限。QLib模型给出BNB、BTC、ETH并列第一（分数0.0007），但分数绝对值极低，表明整体市场缺乏强劲动量。从痛苦交易角度看，BNB和DOGE的爆仓多空比高达6.90和4.04，显示多头仓位拥挤且正遭受强平痛苦，存在多头挤压风险；而ETH和SOL的爆仓多空比分别为4.03和1.73，同样偏向多头受压。鲸鱼流向显示ETH在24h内出现代币提币囤货（248,809.6 ETH流出），但稳定币流出（-$6,424,347），表明鲸鱼在积累代币但资金离场，形成分歧；SOL则代币充币抛售（-799,543.6 SOL流入）且稳定币流出，看跌信号更强。技术面普遍RSI在42-52区间，ADX低于25，市场缺乏趋势强度。决策依据：基于爆仓数据和鲸鱼流向，定位BNB和DOGE为高风险多头陷阱，ETH为潜在鲸鱼托底但资金面矛盾，SOL为看跌主导。剧本选择：采用均值回归（MEAN_REVERSION）策略，避开拥挤多头，等待回调或反转信号。
analysis_summary.en: Narrative Synthesis: Market is in neutral consolidation with hawkish macro (Fed rate expectations rising, VIX high), but price shows no panic selling, indicating limited downside pressure. QLib model ranks BNB, BTC, ETH equally top (score 0.0007), but absolute values are very low, suggesting overall weak momentum. Pain trade analysis: BNB and DOGE have high liquidation long/short ratios (6.90 and 4.04), showing crowded long positions under liquidation pressure, posing long squeeze risks; ETH and SOL ratios are 4.03 and 1.73, also favoring long-side pain. Whale flows: ETH shows token withdrawal accumulation (248,809.6 ETH out) but stablecoin outflow (-$6,424,347), indicating divergence; SOL has token deposit selling (-799,543.6 SOL in) and stablecoin outflow, stronger bearish signal. Technicals: RSI 42-52, ADX below 25, lack of trend strength. Decision basis: Using liquidation data and whale flows, identify BNB and DOGE as high-risk long traps, ETH as potential whale accumulation but conflicting capital flows, SOL as bearish dominant. Scenario selection: Adopt mean reversion (MEAN_REVERSION) to avoid crowded longs and await pullback or reversal signals.

analysis_summary.zh:
【叙事校验】当前市场处于中性震荡环境，宏观背景显示风险偏好下降（VIX上升，DXY走强），但价格与SMA50偏离度普遍为正，长期趋势仍看涨。新闻面平静，无新驱动，价格小幅下跌伴随成交量萎缩，属于动能衰竭阶段，而非新信号触发。
【决策依据详情】技术面：BNB、BTC、ETH的RSI（51-53）和ADX（13-21）均处于中性区间，无明显趋势强度；上/下影线比率显示BNB下影线较长（15%），有托底迹象，而SOL上影线短（5%）且无下影线，表明上方抛压轻但缺乏买盘。量化：Qlib排名前三（BNB、BTC、ETH）得分相同（0.0007），优势不显著；DOGE和SOL得分负（-0.0003），相对弱势。
【痛苦交易】基于爆仓多空比：BNB（2.97）和ETH（1.93）显示多头受压显著，存在多头挤压风险；BTC（0.45）和SOL（0.26）显示空头受压，但空头爆仓量较小，轧空机会有限；DOGE（0.76）相对平衡。持仓L/S比：BNB（0.86/0.87）和BTC（0.97/0.98）显示大户偏空，ETH（1.26/0.93）和SOL（1.22/0.92）显示账户数偏多但持仓量偏空，矛盾信号暗示潜在陷阱。
【剧本选择】选择均值回归（MEAN_REVERSION），因市场无新驱动，技术指标中性，爆仓数据指向BNB和ETH的多头痛苦可能引发小幅反弹，但整体风险高，需谨慎。趋势跟随和轧空剧本因动量不足和流动性有限被拒绝。
analysis_summary.en:
Narrative Synthesis (MANDATORY UNIQUE CONTENT):
1. [Narrative Validation]: Market is in neutral consolidation with risk-off macro (VIX rising, DXY stronger), but prices above SMA50 indicate bullish long-term trend. No new news, price declines with low volume suggest momentum exhaustion, not new impulse.
2. [Decision Details]: Technically, RSI (51-53) and ADX (13-21) are neutral for BNB, BTC, ETH; BNB has long lower wick (15%) showing support, SOL has short upper wick (5%) and no lower wick indicating light selling pressure but weak buying. Quantitatively, Qlib top three (BNB, BTC, ETH) have equal scores (0.0007), not significant; DOGE and SOL have negative scores (-0.0003), relatively weak.
3. [Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation long/short ratio: BNB (2.97) and ETH (1.93) show long-side pain, risk of long squeeze; BTC (0.45) and SOL (0.26) show short-side pain but low liquidation amounts, limited squeeze opportunity; DOGE (0.76) is balanced. Whale L/S ratio: BNB (0.86/0.87) and BTC (0.97/0.98) indicate whale bias short, ETH (1.26/0.93) and SOL (1.22/0.92) show contradictory signals (more accounts long but volume short), hinting at potential traps.
4. [Scenario Selection]: Chose MEAN_REVERSION as market lacks new drivers, technicals are neutral, and liquidation data suggests potential small rebound from long pain in BNB/ETH, but overall risk is high. TREND_FOLLOWING rejected due to low momentum; MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE rejected due to insufficient liquidity and conflicting signals.

red_team_audit.zh: 【强制要求全中文】如果判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：市场可能延续下跌趋势，因宏观风险加剧（VIX高企）导致整体抛压，而非均值回归反弹。数据支撑：ETH和SOL的鲸鱼代币流向显示充币抛售（24h和7d均为负），稳定币流出，表明机构看跌；BNB和BTC的大户持仓偏空，可能引领下跌。此外，Qlib得分差异小，无强 alpha 信号，反弹可能乏力。
red_team_audit.en: Forced Contra-Argument: If thesis is WRONG, most likely reason is continued downtrend due to macro risk-off (high VIX) driving overall selling pressure, not mean reversion bounce. Supporting data: ETH and SOL whale token flows show selling (negative for 24h and 7d), stablecoin outflows indicate institutional bearishness; BNB and BTC whale positions are short-biased, potentially leading declines. Also, Qlib scores are similar with no strong alpha, bounce may be weak.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 【要求全中文】最明显的冲突信号：ETH和SOL的鲸鱼代币流向为负（充币抛售），稳定币流出，这与看涨的均值回归矛盾。风险点：全球宏观背景偏风险规避（VIX上升，DXY走强），可能压制反弹。解释：这些信号确实存在，但当前价格已小幅下跌，爆仓多空比显示多头痛苦可能短期缓解，技术面中性提供缓冲，因此不推翻交易结论，但需轻仓并严格止损。
contrary_signal_check.en: List the most significant contrary signal or risk point and justify why it doesn't invalidate the trade: Most obvious conflict: ETH and SOL whale token flows negative (selling), stablecoin outflows, contradict bullish mean reversion. Risk point: Global macro is risk-off (VIX rising, DXY stronger), may suppress bounce. Justification: These signals are present, but price has already declined slightly, liquidation ratios show long pain may ease short-term, and neutral technicals provide cushion, so not invalidating, but require light position and strict stop loss.

technical_signal.zh: 【全中文】1) 上/下影线比率：BNB下影线15%较长，表明买盘托底；SOL上影线5%短且无下影线，显示上方抛压轻但缺乏支撑。2) RSI与ADX状态：BNB RSI 51.6、ADX 21.2（趋势弱）；BTC RSI 52.4、ADX 15.6（中性）；ETH RSI 50.8、ADX 13.3（无趋势）；SOL RSI 51.7、ADX 13.4（无趋势）；DOGE RSI 49.3、ADX 18.4（中性）。3) 价格与均线偏离度：BNB +0.26%、BTC +0.70%、ETH +0.16%、SOL +1.34%、DOGE +0.47%，均正偏离但幅度小。
technical_signal.en: 【IMPORTANT】Must explicitly mention: 1) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: BNB lower wick 15% long, indicating buying support; SOL upper wick 5% short and no lower wick, showing light selling pressure but weak support. 2) RSI & ADX status: BNB RSI 51.6, ADX 21.2 (weak trend); BTC RSI 52.4, ADX 15.6 (neutral); ETH RSI 50.8, ADX 13.3 (no trend); SOL RSI 51.7, ADX 13.4 (no trend); DOGE RSI 49.3, ADX 18.4 (neutral). 3) SMA deviation: BNB +0.26%, BTC +0.70%, ETH +0.16%, SOL +1.34%, DOGE +0.47%, all positive but small.

macro_onchain.en: 【IMPORTANT】Must explicitly mention: 1) 24h Liquidation Data & Long/Short Liquidation Ratio: BNB long $6,605/short $2,223 (ratio 2.97), ETH long $8,347,066/short $4,336,102 (1.93), BTC long $5,183,888/short $11,473,673 (0.45), SOL long $205,448/short $780,537 (0.26), DOGE long $534,323/short $703,370 (0.76). 2) Whale Net Inflow/Outflow: ETH token flow +28,436.5 ETH (withdrawal bullish), but stablecoin flow -$7,640,408 (outflow bearish); SOL token flow -127,039.4 SOL (deposit bearish), stablecoin flow -$34,568 (outflow bearish). 3) Funding Rate: BNB 0.0100%, BTC 0.0100%, ETH 0.0100%, DOGE 0.0100% all neutral, SOL -0.0077% slightly negative.

quantitative_analysis.zh: 【全中文】Qlib排名靠前币种：BNB、BTC、ETH并列第一（得分0.0007），但得分接近零，显著性低；DOGE和SOL排名靠后（得分-0.0003），显示弱势。量价偏差：资金费率Z-score普遍高（如BTC 156.95%），但费率绝对值低，无极端异常；波动率NATR在1.23%-1.81%区间，属中等。
quantitative_analysis.en: Analyze Qlib top-ranked coins and Z-Score significance: Top coins BNB, BTC, ETH tied rank 1 (score 0.0007), but scores near zero, low significance; DOGE and SOL lower rank (score -0.0003), showing weakness. Statistical deviations: Funding Z-scores high (e.g., BTC 156.95%), but absolute rates low, no extreme anomalies; NATR volatility 1.23%-1.81%, medium range.

regime_safety.zh: 【全中文必填】基于痛苦交易评估：1) RSI/ADX/NATR当前状态：普遍中性，无超买超卖；2) 上/下影线比率：BNB下影线长提供支撑，其他币种影线平衡；3) 爆仓多空比：BNB和ETH多头痛苦高，存在挤压风险；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH和SOL流向矛盾，整体偏空。结论：安全均值回归（SAFE_MR），因技术面中性，爆仓数据暗示短期反弹可能，但鲸鱼信号矛盾需谨慎，非接飞刀或轧空场景。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4B (Pain Trade): 1) RSI/ADX/NATR current state: Mostly neutral, no overbought/oversold; 2) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: BNB long lower wick provides support, others balanced; 3) Liquidation long/short ratio: BNB and ETH high long pain, squeeze risk; 4) Whale net flow direction: ETH and SOL flows contradictory, overall bearish bias. Conclude with explicit verdict: SAFE_MR, as technicals neutral, liquidation data hints at short-term bounce potential, but whale signals contradictory require caution, not KNIFE or WHALE_SQUEEZE.

analysis_summary.zh:
【叙事校验】当前市场处于中性偏弱环境（1D RSI普遍50-55，市场环境标记为BEAR），但长期趋势仍为看涨（价格>SMA50）。宏观背景显示美联储鹰派（利率预期上升），VIX恐慌指数走高，但美元指数中性。新闻面暂无重大驱动。价格走势与数据呈现分歧：QLib模型显示BNB和BTC相对强度最高（得分0.0007），但两者24h回报为轻微负值（BTC -0.10%，BNB +0.06%），表明动量未完全跟随量化信号，可能处于动能衰竭阶段。
【决策依据详情】选择BNB进行趋势跟随，基于：1) QLib排名第1（得分0.0007），技术面RSI 59.28（中性偏强），MACD正柱1.9208，动量12为0.0242（五币中最高）；2) 交易所情绪指数0.50（五币中最高），持仓L/S比显示大户账户数比0.88（空头略占优），但持仓量比0.87（相对均衡），爆仓多空比2.97（多头爆仓显著高于空头，显示多头受压，但未极端拥挤）；3) 价格偏离SMA50仅+0.92%，上影线比率27% vs 下影线8%（下影线短，支撑测试不足），波动率NATR 1.25%（五币中最低），风险可控。

analysis_summary.en:
Narrative Synthesis: Market is in neutral-weak environment (1D RSI 50-55, labeled BEAR) but long-term trend bullish (price > SMA50). Macro shows Fed hawkish (rate expectations rising), VIX high fear, but DXY neutral. No major news drivers. Price-data divergence: QLib shows BNB and BTC strongest (score 0.0007), but 24h returns slightly negative (BTC -0.10%, BNB +0.06%), indicating momentum not fully aligning with quant signals, possibly in exhaustion phase.
Decision Details: Select BNB for trend following based on: 1) QLib rank 1 (score 0.0007), technicals RSI 59.28 (neutral-strong), MACD hist positive 1.9208, momentum_12 0.0242 (highest among 5 coins); 2) Exchange sentiment index 0.50 (highest), whale L/S ratio shows account ratio 0.88 (slight short bias) but position ratio 0.87 (balanced), liquidation long/short ratio 2.97 (longs suffering more but not extreme); 3) Price deviation from SMA50 +0.92%, upper/lower wick ratio 27% vs 8% (lower wick short, support untested), NATR 1.25% (lowest volatility).
Pain Trade: Based on liquidation ratios: BNB 2.97, ETH 1.66, DOGE 0.28, SOL 0.20, BTC 0.42. BNB and ETH have higher long liquidation ratios, indicating long pain, but BNB absolute liquidation tiny ($8,828 total), no large squeeze risk. Conversely, SOL and DOGE have high short liquidation ratios but small amounts, no clear short squeeze. Overall market has no extreme traps; BNB's long pain may allow for minor pullback opportunities.
Scenario Selection: Choose TREND_FOLLOWING because: 1) BNB has strongest QLib signal with technical support for upward momentum; 2) No extreme sentiment (funding rate 0.0100% normal, L/S ratio not crowded); 3) Pain trade shows mild long pressure but no squeeze trigger, making trend following lower risk. Mean reversion not applicable (RSI not overbought/oversold, funding not extreme). Microstructure squeeze not applicable (liquidation volumes too small for significant liquidity events).

analysis_summary.zh:
【叙事校验】当前市场处于中性震荡阶段，宏观背景稳定（美联储利率3.68%中性，VIX 25.33高恐慌但上升），但1D级别市场环境均为BEAR（RSI_1D 50-54），显示短期动能不足。价格与SMA50普遍偏离+0.7%至+2.0%，处于温和超买但未极端。新闻面平静，无重大新驱动，属于“动能衰竭”状态，而非新信号触发。
【决策依据详情】Qlib排名显示BNB与BTC并列第一（score 0.0007），但分数绝对值极低，信号微弱。技术面：BNB RSI 59.28接近超买，上影线比率43%显示抛压；BTC RSI 55.9中性，上影线31%略高；ETH RSI 54.78中性，但24h代币净流入264,214.7 ETH（提币囤货）与稳定币净流出$7.6M矛盾；SOL RSI 55.1中性，但代币净流出127,039.4 SOL（充币抛售）与稳定币净流入$107K矛盾。
【痛苦交易】基于爆仓多空比：BNB=2.59（多头受压显著），ETH=1.66（多头受压），BTC=0.42（空头受压），SOL=0.19（空头受压），DOGE=0.28（空头受压）。持仓L/S比显示：DOGE大户账户数比1.34最拥挤多头，BNB持仓量比0.87最拥挤空头。综合看，BNB和ETH存在LONG SQUEEZE DANGER（多头挤压风险），BTC、SOL、DOGE存在SHORT SQUEEZE OPPORTUNITY（空头轧空机会）但强度弱。
【剧本选择】选择MEAN_REVERSION，因技术指标（RSI 54-59）未超极端，但爆仓多空比与持仓拥挤度显示局部陷阱，且Qlib信号微弱，趋势跟随缺乏动能。微观结构上，BNB和ETH的多头拥挤与高爆仓比适合反向操作。
analysis_summary.en:
Narrative Synthesis: Market in neutral consolidation with stable macro (Fed rate 3.68% neutral, VIX 25.33 high fear rising), but 1D regime BEAR (RSI_1D 50-54) indicates weak short-term momentum. Prices deviate +0.7% to +2.0% from SMA50, mildly overbought but not extreme. No major news drivers, suggesting 'momentum exhaustion' rather than new impulse.
Decision Details: Qlib ranks BNB and BTC top (score 0.0007) but absolute scores very low, weak signal. Technically: BNB RSI 59.28 near overbought, upper wick 43% shows selling pressure; BTC RSI 55.9 neutral, upper wick 31% moderate; ETH RSI 54.78 neutral, but 24h token net inflow 264,214.7 ETH (withdrawal) contradicts stablecoin net outflow $7.6M; SOL RSI 55.1 neutral, but token net outflow 127,039.4 SOL (deposit) contradicts stablecoin net inflow $107K.
Pain Trade: Based on liquidation long/short ratio: BNB=2.59 (longs pressured), ETH=1.66 (longs pressured), BTC=0.42 (shorts pressured), SOL=0.19 (shorts pressured), DOGE=0.28 (shorts pressured). Position L/S ratios show: DOGE whale account ratio 1.34 most crowded long, BNB position ratio 0.87 most crowded short. Overall, BNB and ETH have LONG SQUEEZE DANGER, while BTC, SOL, DOGE have weak SHORT SQUEEZE OPPORTUNITY.
Scenario Selection: Choose MEAN_REVERSION because technicals (RSI 54-59) not extreme, but liquidation ratios and crowding indicate local traps, Qlib signals weak, and trend-following lacks momentum. Microstructurally, BNB and ETH's long crowding and high liquidation ratios favor reversal plays.

red_team_audit.zh: 【强制要求全中文】如果判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 宏观突然转向（如VIX飙升或美联储鹰派），引发全市场下跌，使均值回归失效；2) 鲸鱼数据滞后或噪声（如ETH代币流入可能为内部转账而非看涨），导致方向误判；3) 爆仓多空比可能反映已发生事件而非未来压力，例如BNB多头已部分平仓，风险降低；4) Qlib微弱信号可能预示横盘而非反转，价格可能继续窄幅震荡。数据支撑反面结论：BTC空头受压但价格未涨，显示买盘不足；SOL稳定币流入微小，不足以推动大涨。
red_team_audit.en: Forced Contra-Argument: If thesis is WRONG, most likely reasons: 1) Macro sudden shift (e.g., VIX spike or Fed hawkish) causing broad sell-off, invalidating mean reversion; 2) Whale data lag/noise (e.g., ETH token inflow could be internal transfer not bullish), leading to directional error; 3) Liquidation ratios may reflect past events not future pressure, e.g., BNB longs already reduced, lowering risk; 4) Qlib weak signals may indicate sideways action not reversal, price could continue ranging. Data supporting opposite view: BTC shorts pressured but price not rising shows lack of buying; SOL stablecoin inflow tiny, insufficient for rally.

Justification: BNB Qlib score 0.0007 very low, momentum may be fading; ETH stablecoin outflow $7.6M offsets token inflow, funding divergence; SMA50 deviations mild, not extreme overbought, mean reversion risk manageable.

analysis_summary.zh:
【叙事校验】当前市场处于中性震荡环境，宏观背景稳定（美联储利率中性，美元指数中性），但VIX恐慌指数上升至25.33，显示市场情绪偏谨慎。价格走势与新闻无明显新驱动，属于动能衰竭阶段。QLib模型显示BNB和BTC排名前二（分数0.0007），但分数绝对值较低，表明相对强度微弱，无强烈趋势信号。鲸鱼数据揭示关键分歧：ETH在24h内出现236,612.3 ETH的提币囤货（看涨信号），但稳定币流出$8,183,823（看跌信号），形成内部矛盾；SOL则持续充币抛售（24h -61,391.0 SOL，7d -13,445,413.8 SOL），但稳定币流入（24h $95,623），暗示潜在抛压。整体市场无明确叙事突破，价格在窄幅区间内波动，属于情绪分歧状态。
【决策依据详情】技术面：BNB RSI 58.7接近超买，但ADX 23.7显示趋势强度中等；BTC RSI 54.9中性，ADX 16.7趋势弱；ETH RSI 54.5中性，ADX 14.7无趋势；SOL RSI 53.7中性，ADX 14.9无趋势；DOGE RSI 58.2略高，ADX 21.3趋势中等。均线偏离度：DOGE最高（+2.18%），BNB最低（+0.59%），显示DOGE短期超买风险。爆仓多空比：ETH 1.75（多头受压显著），SOL 0.18（空头受压显著），BTC 0.70（空头略受压），BNB 0.50（空头受压），DOGE 0.23（空头受压）。鲸鱼流向：ETH代币流入看涨但资金流出看跌，SOL代币流出看跌但资金流入看涨，形成反向信号。QLib分数：BNB和BTC排名1-2但分数仅0.0007，显著性低。
【痛苦交易】基于爆仓多空比和L/S比：ETH多头拥挤（持仓L/S比1.13/0.96）且爆仓多空比1.75，显示多头处于强制平仓边缘，有LONG SQUEEZE风险；SOL空头拥挤（持仓L/S比1.19/0.94）且爆仓多空比0.18，显示空头处于强制平仓边缘，有SHORT SQUEEZE机会；其他资产空头受压但无极端拥挤。
【剧本选择】当前微观结构支持MEAN_REVERSION剧本：价格处于中性区间，技术指标无强烈趋势，鲸鱼数据内部矛盾，且多个资产（如DOGE、BNB）RSI接近超买区域，存在回调压力。选择此剧本因风险回报比优于趋势跟随（无强动量）和轧空（仅SOL有明确信号但代币流向看跌）。
analysis_summary.en:
Narrative Synthesis: Market is in neutral consolidation with stable macro (Fed rate neutral, DXY neutral), but VIX rising to 25.33 indicates cautious sentiment. Price action lacks new drivers, suggesting momentum exhaustion. QLib ranks BNB and BTC top (score 0.0007), but low absolute scores imply weak relative strength. Whale data shows key divergences: ETH has token withdrawal (236,612.3 ETH, bullish) but stablecoin outflow ($-8,183,823, bearish); SOL has token deposit (-61,391.0 SOL, bearish) but stablecoin inflow ($95,623, bullish). Overall, no clear narrative break, prices range-bound, indicating sentiment divergence.
Decision Details: Technicals: BNB RSI 58.7 near overbought, ADX 23.7 moderate trend; BTC RSI 54.9 neutral, ADX 16.7 weak trend; ETH RSI 54.5 neutral, ADX 14.7 no trend; SOL RSI 53.7 neutral, ADX 14.9 no trend; DOGE RSI 58.2 slightly high, ADX 21.3 moderate trend. SMA deviations: DOGE highest (+2.18%), BNB lowest (+0.59%), showing DOGE short-term overbought risk. Liquidation ratios: ETH 1.75 (longs pressured), SOL 0.18 (shorts pressured), BTC 0.70 (shorts slightly pressured), BNB 0.50 (shorts pressured), DOGE 0.23 (shorts pressured). Whale flows: ETH token inflow bullish but stablecoin outflow bearish, SOL token outflow bearish but stablecoin inflow bullish, creating opposing signals. QLib scores: BNB and BTC rank 1-2 but only 0.0007, low significance.
Pain Trade: Based on liquidation ratios and L/S ratios: ETH longs crowded (L/S ratio 1.13/0.96) with liquidation ratio 1.75, indicating LONG SQUEEZE danger; SOL shorts crowded (L/S ratio 1.19/0.94) with liquidation ratio 0.18, indicating SHORT SQUEEZE opportunity; other assets have shorts pressured but no extreme crowding.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于中性震荡环境，宏观背景稳定（美联储利率中性，美元指数中性），但VIX恐慌指数处于高位上升（25.52），显示市场存在潜在不安。价格走势与新闻/宏观数据无明显新驱动（Impulse），属于旧消息消化阶段（Priced In）。观察到ETH出现显著分歧：价格小幅下跌（-0.25%），但24小时鲸鱼代币流向显示236,612.3 ETH提币囤货（看涨信号），而稳定币净流出$8.18M（看跌信号），形成数据矛盾，暗示可能隐藏积累（Hidden Accumulation）。【决策依据详情】Qlib排名前二为BNB和BTC（得分0.0007），但技术指标中性（RSI 56.47/52.82，ADX 23.7/16.8），动量微弱。ETH Qlib排名最差（-0.0006），但鲸鱼代币流向强烈看涨，形成量化与链上数据背离。【痛苦交易】基于爆仓多空比：ETH为1.68（多头受压显著），SOL为0.16（空头受压显著），BTC为0.54（空头受压），BNB为0.48（空头受压），DOGE为0.19（空头受压）。持仓L/S比显示ETH大户账户数比1.11（略微拥挤多头），但持仓量比0.97（平衡），结合高爆仓多空比，存在多头挤压风险（LONG SQUEEZE DANGER）。SOL持仓L/S比1.14（略微拥挤多头），但爆仓多空比极低（0.16），显示空头已被大量强平，冲高动能可能衰竭。【剧本选择】选择NARRATIVE_DIVERGENCE剧本，因为ETH出现价格下跌与鲸鱼提币囤货的显著背离，暗示机构可能在下跌中积累，而零售多头可能因高爆仓比面临挤压。其他资产（如SOL、BTC）技术面中性，无明确趋势或极端信号，适合监控。
analysis_summary.en: Narrative Synthesis: Market is in neutral consolidation with stable macro (Fed rate neutral, DXY neutral), but VIX at high fear rising (25.52) indicates underlying unease. Price action shows no new drivers vs news/macro (Priced In). Key divergence observed in ETH: price down slightly (-0.25%), but 24h whale token flow shows 236,612.3 ETH withdrawn (bullish), while stablecoin outflow $8.18M (bearish), creating data contradiction suggesting potential hidden accumulation. Decision Details: Qlib top ranks are BNB and BTC (score 0.0007), but technicals neutral (RSI 56.47/52.82, ADX 23.7/16.8), momentum weak. ETH ranks worst (-0.0006) but whale token flow strongly bullish, creating quant vs on-chain divergence. Pain Trade: Based on liquidation long/short ratios: ETH 1.68 (longs under pressure), SOL 0.16 (shorts squeezed), BTC 0.54 (shorts pressured), BNB 0.48 (shorts pressured), DOGE 0.19 (shorts pressured). ETH L/S ratio shows 1.11 account ratio (slightly crowded long) but 0.97 position ratio (balanced), combined with high liq ratio, indicates long squeeze risk. SOL L/S ratio 1.14 (slightly crowded long) but very low liq ratio (0.16) suggests shorts already flushed, upward momentum may fade. Scenario Selection: Chose NARRATIVE_DIVERGENCE playbook due to ETH's strong divergence between price drop and whale withdrawal (accumulation signal), while retail longs face squeeze risk. Other assets (SOL, BTC) have neutral technicals, no clear trends or extremes, warrant monitoring.

SOL's very low short liquidation ratio (0.16) may have fully released short pressure, but L/S ratio 1.14 shows longs still crowded, and if price fails to break higher, it could reverse down. Macro-wise, high rising VIX could trigger risk-off sentiment, dragging down entire crypto market.

entry_reason.zh: 【强制严格按此4点模板输出，无论是开仓还是monitor】：1) 为何是此币：ETH技术面RSI 54.8中性，ADX 14.7趋势弱，均线偏离度+0.75%轻微超买，爆仓多空比1.68显示多头受压，但鲸鱼代币净流入236,612.3 ETH（提币囤货）形成看涨背离。2) 为何是现在：价格下跌中鲸鱼积累，可能预示反转，但稳定币流出$8.18M和Qlib分数最差（-0.0006）增加不确定性，需等待更明确信号。3) 手动盈亏比(RRR)计算：假设入场价$2166，止损价$2100（风险3.05%），止盈价$2300（盈利6.18%），盈亏比=6.18%/3.05%=2.03。4) 单笔风险占NAV比例：风险$66（3.05% of $2166）占NAV的1.72% <= 2%，但选择monitor是因为数据矛盾（稳定币流出与代币流入冲突）和信心概率70%，需进一步确认鲸鱼意图。

invalidation.zh: 明确描述：如果价格跌破$2100（关键支撑）或鲸鱼代币流向反转（转为充币抛售），则看涨积累论点失效，应立即离场。
invalidation.en: Clearly state: if price breaks below $2100 (key support) or whale token flow reverses (to deposit/selling), the bullish accumulation thesis is invalidated, must exit immediately.

【叙事校验】当前市场处于中性震荡环境，宏观背景稳定（美联储利率中性，美元指数中性），但VIX恐慌指数上升至25.66，显示市场情绪偏谨慎。价格走势与新闻无明显新驱动，属于动能衰竭阶段。QLib排名显示BNB和BTC相对强势（分数0.0007），但整体动量平均仅0.0087，市场缺乏明确方向。巨鲸数据揭示关键分歧：ETH在24小时内出现236,612.3 ETH的提币囤货（看涨信号），但稳定币流出$8.18M（看跌信号），形成数据矛盾；SOL则显示代币充币抛售（-61,391.0 SOL）但稳定币流入$95,623，暗示潜在洗盘或机构换手。这并非新信号触发，而是情绪分歧，价格可能横盘整理。
【决策依据详情】技术面：BNB RSI 57.56接近超买但未极端，ADX 24.5显示趋势强度中等；BTC RSI 53.78中性，ADX 17.4趋势弱；DOGE RSI 59.1偏高但动量0.0157最强。爆仓数据：ETH爆仓多空比1.68（多头受压），BTC 0.54（空头受压），SOL 0.16（空头受压极低）。巨鲸流向：ETH代币流正+稳定币流负，SOL代币流负+稳定币流正，形成反向流动。QLib分数显著性低（最高仅0.0007），量价偏差不明显。
【痛苦交易】基于爆仓多空比和L/S比：ETH多头最拥挤（L/S比1.12/0.97）且爆仓多空比1.68，多头正遭受强平痛苦，有LONG SQUEEZE DANGER；BTC空头较拥挤（L/S比1.00/0.98）且爆仓多空比0.54，空头受压，有SHORT SQUEEZE OPPORTUNITY；SOL空头已大幅挤压（爆仓多空比0.16），冲高动能可能衰竭。
【剧本选择】选择MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE剧本，因为当前微观结构显示ETH多头陷阱和BTC空头挤压机会最清晰，且巨鲸流动提供额外确认。TREND_FOLLOWING被拒绝因市场趋势中性（平均动量低），MEAN_REVERSION被拒绝因技术读数未达极端（RSI均<60）。
analysis_summary.en:
Narrative Synthesis: Market is in neutral consolidation with stable macro (Fed rate neutral, DXY neutral) but rising VIX at 25.66 indicates cautious sentiment. Price action lacks new drivers, suggesting momentum exhaustion. QLib ranks BNB and BTC as strongest (score 0.0007), but average momentum is only 0.0087, showing no clear trend. Whale data reveals key divergences: ETH shows token withdrawal (236,612.3 ETH, bullish) but stablecoin outflow ($-8.18M, bearish), creating矛盾; SOL shows token deposit (-61,391.0 SOL, bearish) but stablecoin inflow ($95,623, bullish), hinting at potential wash trading or institutional rotation. This is not a new impulse but sentiment divergence, likely leading to sideways action.
Decision Details: Technically, BNB RSI 57.56 near overbought but not extreme, ADX 24.5 moderate trend strength; BTC RSI 53.78 neutral, ADX 17.4 weak trend; DOGE RSI 59.1偏高 but momentum 0.0157 strongest. Liquidation data: ETH liq ratio 1.68 (longs pressured), BTC 0.54 (shorts pressured), SOL 0.16 (shorts heavily squeezed). Whale flows: ETH token flow positive + stablecoin flow negative, SOL token flow negative + stablecoin flow positive, showing反向流动. QLib scores are low significance (max 0.0007), with no major vol/funding deviations.
Pain Trade: Based on liq ratios and L/S ratios: ETH longs are most crowded (L/S ratio 1.12/0.97) with liq ratio 1.68, indicating LONG SQUEEZE DANGER; BTC shorts are crowded (L/S ratio 1.00/0.98) with liq ratio 0.54, indicating SHORT SQUEEZE OPPORTUNITY; SOL shorts are heavily squeezed (liq ratio 0.16), suggesting upward momentum may exhaust.
Scenario Selection: Choose MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE playbook as current microstructure clearly shows ETH long trap and BTC short squeeze opportunity, confirmed by whale flows. TREND_FOLLOWING rejected due to neutral market trend (low average momentum), MEAN_REVERSION rejected as technical readings are not extreme (all RSI <60).

red_team_audit.zh: 【红色突击队审计】如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 宏观风险升级：VIX恐慌指数已高，若全球事件（如地缘政治）引发避险，可能压倒微观挤压信号，导致所有资产下跌，BTC空头挤压失效。2) 巨鲸流动误导：ETH的稳定币流出可能预示更大抛售，而非积累，价格若跌破SMA50支撑（$2158.65），多头挤压将加剧。3) 市场流动性不足：当前成交量比率普遍偏低（0.6x-0.9x），挤压可能缺乏动能，价格横盘而非突破。数据支撑反面：ETH爆仓多空比1.68显示多头痛苦，但若空头突然增仓，价格可能进一步下跌；SOL稳定币流入微小（$95,623），不足以推动大幅上涨。
red_team_audit.en: Forced Contra-Argument: If my thesis is WRONG, the most likely reasons are: 1) Macro risk escalation: VIX is already high, and if global events (e.g., geopolitics) trigger risk-off, it could overwhelm microstructure squeeze signals, causing broad declines and invalidating BTC short squeeze. 2) Whale flow misdirection: ETH's stablecoin outflow might indicate larger selling pressure, not accumulation; if price breaks below SMA50 support ($2158.65), long squeeze could intensify. 3) Low market liquidity: Current volume ratios are low (0.6x-0.9x), squeezes may lack momentum, leading to sideways action rather than breakout. Supporting data: ETH liq ratio 1.68 shows long pain, but if shorts increase aggressively, price could drop further; SOL stablecoin inflow is small ($95,623), insufficient for major rally.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 【冲突信号检查】当前最明显的冲突信号：1) ETH巨鲸代币流向与稳定币流向相反（提币囤货但资金离场），这可能导致价格犹豫，而非明确方向。我解释为机构换手或短期调整，不会推翻交易，因为爆仓数据更直接指示挤压风险。2) QLib分数普遍偏低（最高0.0007），显示量化模型预测弱，可能缺乏趋势动能。我解释为市场中性环境，挤压剧本不依赖强趋势，而是依赖流动性事件。3) DOGE动量最强（0.0157）但未开仓，因为其爆仓多空比0.18显示空头已大幅挤压，风险回报比不足。
contrary_signal_check.en: List the most significant contrary signal or risk point and justify why it doesn't invalidate the trade: 1) ETH whale token flow vs stablecoin flow are opposite (withdrawal but capital outflow), which could cause price indecision. I interpret this as institutional rotation or short-term adjustment, not invalidating as liquidation data more directly indicates squeeze risk. 2) QLib scores are generally low (max 0.0007), suggesting weak model predictions and lack of trend momentum. I interpret this as neutral market regime where squeeze playbook relies on liquidity events, not strong trends. 3) DOGE has strongest momentum (0.0157) but no trade opened because its liq ratio 0.18 shows shorts heavily squeezed, leading to insufficient risk-reward.

analysis_summary.zh:
【叙事校验】当前市场处于中性震荡环境，宏观背景稳定（美联储利率中性，美元指数中性），但VIX恐慌指数升至25.49显示市场情绪偏谨慎。价格走势方面，BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB、DOGE均处于1D级别的BEAR市场环境，但长期趋势看涨（价格高于SMA50）。从数据看，新闻焦点暂无重大驱动，市场缺乏新叙事，价格小幅上涨但动能不足，属于动能衰竭阶段。
【决策依据详情】Qlib模型推荐BNB和BTC为前两名（分数0.0007），但分数绝对值低，信号弱。技术面：BNB RSI 57.56接近中性，ADX 24.5显示趋势强度中等，上影线比率67%表明抛压存在；BTC RSI 53.78中性，ADX 17.4趋势弱，上影线比率75%抛压显著。情绪面：BNB资金费率0.0100%偏高（Z-Score 98.23%），显示多头拥挤；BTC资金费率0.0026%正常（Z-Score 52.17%）。爆仓数据：BNB爆仓多空比0.48（空单爆仓更多），BTC爆仓多空比0.54（空单爆仓更多），表明空头近期受压，但多头未大规模爆仓。鲸鱼流向：ETH 24h代币净流入236,612.3 ETH（提币囤货看涨），但7d净流出-7,239,812.7 ETH（充币抛售看跌），资金流向24h净流出$-8,183,823（资金离场看跌），显示短期看涨但中期分歧；SOL 24h代币净流出-61,391.0 SOL（充币抛售看跌），资金流向24h净流入$95,623（资金入场看涨），矛盾信号。
【痛苦交易】基于持仓L/S比和爆仓多空比：BNB持仓L/S比0.88/0.86（空头略多），爆仓多空比0.48（空单爆仓更多），空头可能被挤压；BTC持仓L/S比1.00/0.98（多头略多），爆仓多空比0.54（空单爆仓更多），空头受压但多头未极端拥挤；ETH爆仓多空比1.81（多单爆仓更多），显示多头痛苦，可能面临挤压风险；SOL爆仓多空比0.21（空单爆仓更多），空头痛苦但代币流出看跌。整体看，空头在BNB和BTC有挤压风险，多头在ETH有挤压风险。
【剧本选择】当前市场缺乏强趋势，Qlib分数低，技术面中性偏弱，鲸鱼信号矛盾。选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因为BNB资金费率偏高（Z-Score 98.23%）和上影线比率67%显示抛压，可能回调；同时，空头在BNB和BTC有挤压风险，但价格未突破关键阻力，均值回归胜算较高。TREND_FOLLOWING被拒绝因动量不足（平均动量0.0087低）且趋势弱；MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE被拒绝因爆仓数据未显示极端拥挤（如爆仓多空比未超2）。
analysis_summary.en:
Narrative Synthesis: Market is in neutral oscillation with stable macro (Fed rate neutral, DXY neutral), but VIX at 25.49 indicates cautious sentiment. Price action shows BEAR environment on 1D for all coins, but bullish long-term (price > SMA50). No major news drivers, price moves lack momentum, suggesting exhaustion phase.
Decision Details: Qlib ranks BNB and BTC top (score 0.0007), but scores are low and weak. Technicals: BNB RSI 57.56 near neutral, ADX 24.5 moderate trend, upper wick ratio 67% indicates selling pressure; BTC RSI 53.78 neutral, ADX 17.4 weak trend, upper wick ratio 75% high selling pressure. Sentiment: BNB funding rate 0.0100% high (Z-Score 98.23%) shows crowded longs; BTC funding rate 0.0026% normal (Z-Score 52.17%). Liquidation data: BNB liq ratio 0.48 (more short liq), BTC liq ratio 0.54 (more short liq), indicating short squeeze pressure but no massive long liq. Whale flows: ETH 24h token net inflow 236,612.3 ETH (bullish withdrawal) but 7d net outflow -7,239,812.7 ETH (bearish deposit), stablecoin net outflow $-8,183,823 (bearish), showing short-term bullish but mid-term divergence; SOL 24h token net outflow -61,391.0 SOL (bearish deposit), stablecoin net inflow $95,623 (bullish), contradictory signals.
Pain Trade: Based on L/S ratios and liq ratios: BNB L/S ratio 0.88/0.86 (slight short bias), liq ratio 0.48 (more short liq), shorts may be squeezed; BTC L/S ratio 1.00/0.98 (slight long bias), liq ratio 0.54 (more short liq), shorts pressured but longs not extreme; ETH liq ratio 1.81 (more long liq), longs in pain with squeeze risk; SOL liq ratio 0.21 (more short liq), shorts in pain but token outflow bearish. Overall, shorts at risk in BNB and BTC, longs at risk in ETH.
Scenario Selection: Market lacks strong trend, low Qlib scores, neutral-weak technicals, contradictory whale signals. Choose MEAN_REVERSION playbook because BNB high funding (Z-Score 98.23%) and upper wick ratio 67% suggest pullback potential; also, short squeeze risk in BNB and BTC but price not breaking key resistance, mean reversion has higher odds. TREND_FOLLOWING rejected due to low momentum (avg 0.0087) and weak trend; MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE rejected as liq data shows no extreme crowding (e.g., liq ratio not >2).

analysis_summary.zh:
【叙事校验】当前市场处于中性震荡环境，宏观背景（美联储利率稳定、美元指数偏弱）支持风险偏好，但VIX恐慌指数上升显示市场情绪谨慎。价格走势与数据呈现分化：QLib模型显示BNB和BTC相对强度最高（得分0.0007），但ETH和SOL的鲸鱼流向出现矛盾信号（ETH 24h代币提币但稳定币流出，SOL代币抛售但稳定币流入），暗示机构可能在ETH上积累而在SOL上调整仓位。整体市场未出现强烈新驱动，属于存量博弈状态。
【决策依据详情】技术面：BNB RSI 57.56接近中性，上影线比率92%显示短期抛压，但均线偏离度+0.47%和ADX 24.5表明趋势强度。BTC RSI 53.78中性，上影线比率81%同样有抛压，但动量0.0034偏弱。ETH RSI 55.2，代币流向236,612.3 ETH提币（看涨）但稳定币流出$8.18M（看跌），形成数据冲突。SOL RSI 56.4，代币流向-61,391 SOL抛售（看跌）但稳定币流入$95,623（看涨），同样冲突。DOGE RSI 59.1略超买，OI变化+13.34%显示杠杆增加。
【痛苦交易】基于爆仓多空比：ETH 1.46（多头受压显著），BTC 0.54（空头受压），SOL 0.21（空头受压极强），BNB 0.49（空头受压），DOGE 0.18（空头受压极强）。结合持仓L/S比：ETH大户账户数比1.11（略偏多），BTC 0.99（均衡），SOL 1.13（略偏多），BNB 0.92（略偏空），DOGE 1.29（明显偏多）。综合看，DOGE和SOL空头挤压风险最高（爆仓多空比低且持仓偏多），ETH多头挤压风险中等（爆仓多空比高）。
【剧本选择】选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因为多个资产出现技术面超买迹象（如DOGE RSI 59.1、上影线比率高）与鲸鱼流向矛盾，且爆仓数据显示空头受压严重，存在回调需求。TREND_FOLLOWING剧本被拒绝，因为QLib得分最高的BNB和BTC动量不足（BNB动量0.0133一般，BTC 0.0034弱）且上影线显示抛压。MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE剧本被拒绝，因为当前未出现极端拥挤（如持仓L/S比未达极端值）或资金费率异常。
analysis_summary.en:
Narrative Synthesis: Market is in neutral oscillation with supportive macro (stable Fed rate, weaker DXY) but cautious sentiment (rising VIX). Price action diverges from data: QLib ranks BNB and BTC highest (score 0.0007), but ETH and SOL show conflicting whale flows (ETH token withdrawal vs stablecoin outflow, SOL token selling vs stablecoin inflow), suggesting institutional accumulation in ETH and adjustment in SOL. No strong new drivers, indicating存量博弈.
Decision Details: Technicals: BNB RSI 57.56 near neutral, upper wick ratio 92% shows selling pressure, but SMA deviation +0.47% and ADX 24.5 indicate trend strength. BTC RSI 53.78 neutral, upper wick 81% with selling pressure, momentum 0.0034 weak. ETH RSI 55.2, token flow 236,612.3 ETH withdrawal (bullish) but stablecoin outflow $8.18M (bearish), creating conflict. SOL RSI 56.4, token flow -61,391 SOL selling (bearish) but stablecoin inflow $95,623 (bullish), similar conflict. DOGE RSI 59.1 slightly overbought, OI change +13.34% shows leverage increase.
Pain Trade: Based on liquidation long/short ratio: ETH 1.46 (longs pressured), BTC 0.54 (shorts pressured), SOL 0.21 (shorts heavily pressured), BNB 0.49 (shorts pressured), DOGE 0.18 (shorts heavily pressured). Combined with L/S ratio: ETH whale account ratio 1.11 (slightly long), BTC 0.99 (balanced), SOL 1.13 (slightly long), BNB 0.92 (slightly short), DOGE 1.29 (clearly long). Overall, DOGE and SOL have highest short squeeze risk (low liq ratio and long bias), ETH has moderate long squeeze risk (high liq ratio).
Scenario Selection: Choose MEAN_REVERSION playbook due to overbought technicals (e.g., DOGE RSI 59.1, high upper wick) conflicting with whale flows, and liquidation data showing heavy short pressure, suggesting pullback potential. TREND_FOLLOWING rejected because top QLib coins BNB and BTC lack momentum (BNB 0.0133 moderate, BTC 0.0034 weak) and show selling pressure via wicks. MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE rejected due to absence of extreme crowding (L/S ratios not extreme) or funding anomalies.

red_team_audit.zh: 【强制要求全中文】如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 市场情绪突然转向乐观，推动价格突破上影线阻力，触发空头挤压（特别是DOGE和SOL），导致价格继续上涨而非回调。数据支撑：DOGE爆仓多空比0.18极低，空头仓位脆弱，任何上涨都可能引发强制平仓。2) 鲸鱼流向的冲突信号可能被误解，例如ETH的稳定币流出可能是短期调整而非看跌，如果价格守住支撑，可能延续上涨。数据支撑：ETH代币提币236,612.3 ETH显示积累意图，技术面RSI 55.2和ADX 15.6未显示超买。3) QLib模型可能准确预测BNB和BTC的相对强势，如果它们带动大盘上涨，均值回归机会将失效。数据支撑：BNB Qlib得分0.0007最高，ADX 24.5趋势较强。
red_team_audit.en: Forced Contra-Argument: If my thesis is WRONG, the most likely reasons are: 1) Market sentiment suddenly turns optimistic, pushing prices above upper wick resistance and triggering short squeezes (especially in DOGE and SOL), causing continued uptrend instead of pullback. Supporting data: DOGE liquidation ratio 0.18 is extremely low, short positions are vulnerable, any rally could force covering. 2) Conflicting whale flows might be misinterpreted, e.g., ETH stablecoin outflow could be short-term adjustment not bearish, and if price holds support, uptrend may resume. Supporting data: ETH token withdrawal 236,612.3 ETH shows accumulation intent, technicals RSI 55.2 and ADX 15.6 not overbought. 3) QLib model might correctly predict BNB and BTC relative strength, and if they lead market rally, mean reversion opportunity fails. Supporting data: BNB Qlib score 0.0007 highest, ADX 24.5 shows strong trend.

contrary_signal_check.zh:
【要求全中文】当前最明显的冲突信号或潜在风险点：1) DOGE和SOL的爆仓多空比极低（0.18和0.21），空头仓位高度脆弱，任何价格上涨都可能引发轧空，推动价格上行而非回调。2) BNB和BTC的QLib得分最高（0.0007），显示相对强势，可能带动市场情绪向好，削弱均值回归逻辑。3) ETH的鲸鱼代币流向为提币236,612.3 ETH，显示机构积累，这可能支撑价格而非下跌。
解释为何它们不会推翻交易结论：1) DOGE和SOL的上影线比率高（74%和77%），显示短期抛压强劲，且RSI接近超买（DOGE 59.1，SOL 56.4），回调概率仍大；爆仓数据是滞后指标，当前价格已反映部分挤压。2) BNB和BTC动量不足（BNB动量0.0133一般，BTC 0.0034弱），且上影线显示阻力，可能难以持续上涨。3) ETH的稳定币流出$8.18M抵消了代币提币的看涨信号，且爆仓多空比1.46显示多头受压，价格可能震荡而非单边上涨。
contrary_signal_check.en:
List the most significant contrary signal or risk point and justify why it doesn't invalidate the trade: 1) DOGE and SOL have extremely low liquidation ratios (0.18 and 0.21), making short positions highly vulnerable; any price increase could trigger squeezes, pushing prices up instead of pulling back. 2) BNB and BTC have highest QLib scores (0.0007), indicating relative strength that could boost market sentiment and weaken mean reversion logic. 3) ETH whale token flow shows withdrawal 236,612.3 ETH, suggesting institutional accumulation that could support prices.
Justification: 1) DOGE and SOL have high upper wick ratios (74% and 77%), indicating strong short-term selling pressure, and RSI near overbought (DOGE 59.1, SOL 56.4), making pullback likely; liquidation data is lagging and already partially priced in. 2) BNB and BTC lack momentum (BNB 0.0133 moderate, BTC 0.0034 weak) and show resistance via wicks, limiting upside potential. 3) ETH stablecoin outflow $8.18M offsets token withdrawal bullishness, and liquidation ratio 1.46 shows long pressure, suggesting consolidation rather than rally.

BNB and BTC show relative strength but momentum is moderate (BNB 0.0133, BTC 0.0034). Statistical deviations: SOL funding Z-Score 145.5160% very high, indicating overheated sentiment; ETH funding Z-Score -6.8046% slightly negative, showing bearish bias. Overall QLib scores have small differences, suggesting limited market divergence.

regime_safety.zh: 【全中文必填】基于痛苦交易评估：1) RSI/ADX/NATR当前状态：多数资产RSI 50-60中性偏强，ADX 15-25显示趋势中等，NATR BNB 1.33%低波动、DOGE 2.15%高波动。2) 上/下影线比率：普遍上影线高（62%-92%），显示抛压。3) 爆仓多空比：DOGE和SOL极低（0.18和0.21），空头受压严重。4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH和SOL矛盾。结论：安全均值回归（SAFE_MR），因为技术面显示超买回调迹象（高上影线、RSI接近60），且爆仓数据支持空头挤压但价格未大幅上涨，风险可控。未达到接飞刀（极端超卖）或挡火箭（极端超买）程度。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Pain Trade: 1) RSI/ADX/NATR current state: Most assets RSI 50-60 neutral-strong, ADX 15-25 moderate trend, NATR BNB 1.33% low vol, DOGE 2.15% high vol. 2) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: Generally high upper wicks (62%-92%), showing selling pressure. 3) Liquidation long/short ratio: DOGE and SOL very low (0.18 and 0.21), shorts heavily pressured. 4) Whale net flow direction: ETH and SOL conflicting. Verdict: SAFE_MR, because technicals show overbought pullback signs (high upper wicks, RSI near 60), and liquidation data supports short squeeze but price hasn't rallied sharply, risk is manageable. Not reaching KNIFE (extreme oversold) or ROCKET (extreme overbought) levels.

【决策依据详情】DOGE的QLib分数0.0146显著高于其他币种（BTC 0.004，BNB 0.0016），RSI 58.23处于中性偏强，但上影线比率77%显示上方抛压较重。ETH的鲸鱼代币流向24h为+236,612.3 ETH（提币囤货），但稳定币流向为-$8,183,823（资金离场），形成数据分歧。SOL的爆仓多空比0.21极低，空头已被大量强平，但代币流向-70,382.5 SOL（充币抛售）暗示潜在抛压。
【痛苦交易】基于爆仓多空比：DOGE（0.18）、SOL（0.21）、BNB（0.49）显示空头已遭受强平痛苦，多头相对安全；BTC（0.54）和ETH（1.46）显示多头受压更重。持仓L/S比：DOGE大户账户数比1.29（多头拥挤），但持仓量比0.86（空头持仓更重），存在矛盾可能引发轧空。
【剧本选择】选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因为多个币种（如DOGE、SOL）技术指标（RSI 58.23、56.24）接近超买，上影线比率高（DOGE 77%、SOL 85%）显示反弹乏力，且鲸鱼流向分歧（ETH提币但资金流出）暗示短期回调压力。

Price action lacks new drivers, suggesting momentum exhaustion. QLib predicts DOGE highest relative strength (score 0.0146), but high volatility (NATR 2.16%) and crowded long risks warrant caution.

ETH whale token flow +236,612.3 ETH (withdrawal) but stablecoin flow -$8,183,823 (outflow) creates divergence. SOL liquidation long/short ratio 0.21 is extremely low (shorts flushed), but token flow -70,382.5 SOL (deposit) suggests potential selling.
【Pain Trade】Based on liquidation ratios: DOGE (0.18), SOL (0.21), BNB (0.49) indicate short-side pain, longs safer; BTC (0.54) and ETH (1.46) show more long-side pressure. Position L/S ratios: DOGE account ratio 1.29 (crowded long) but volume ratio 0.86 (heavier short positions), contradiction may trigger squeeze.
【Scenario Selection】Choose MEAN_REVERSION playbook, as multiple coins (e.g., DOGE, SOL) have technicals near overbought (RSI 58.23, 56.24), high upper wick ratios (DOGE 77%, SOL 85%) indicate weak rebounds, and whale flow divergences (ETH token withdrawal but capital outflow) suggest short-term pullback pressure.

analysis_summary.zh:
1. [叙事校验]：当前市场驱动力为‘已定价’，整体处于中性偏多环境，但无明显新冲动驱动。宏观背景稳定，市场情绪中性，价格与数据未出现显著背离。
2. [决策依据详情]：技术信号显示多数资产RSI在56-60区间，ADX偏低（15-25），表明趋势强度弱；链上数据中ETH有提币囤货（看涨），但稳定币流出（看跌），SOL则代币抛售（看跌）但稳定币流入（看涨），信号冲突；量化指标Qlib排名DOGE第一，但分数绝对值低（0.0162），信号强度一般。
3. [痛苦交易]：强平数据显示BTC、SOL、DOGE空单爆仓量高于多单（爆仓多空比<1），表明空头正遭受痛苦，有轧空风险；持仓L/S比中DOGE大户账户数比1.32（多头拥挤），但持仓量比0.86（空头占优），显示潜在多头陷阱。
4. [剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION，因技术指标（RSI接近60、ADX弱）和情绪数据（如DOGE拥挤多头）显示超买迹象，且无强趋势跟随信号，适合反转交易。
analysis_summary.en:
1. [Narrative Validation]: The current market driver is 'priced-in', with a neutral-to-bullish environment but no clear new impulse. Macro context is stable, sentiment neutral, and no significant divergence between price and data.
2. [Decision Details]: Technical signals show RSI in 56-60 range and low ADX (15-25), indicating weak trend strength; on-chain data for ETH shows token withdrawal (bullish) but stablecoin outflow (bearish), while SOL shows token selling (bearish) but stablecoin inflow (bullish), creating conflicting signals; quantitative Qlib ranks DOGE first but with low absolute score (0.0162), suggesting weak signal strength.
3. [Pain Trade]: Liquidation data shows higher short-side liquidations for BTC, SOL, DOGE (liquidation long/short ratio <1), indicating short-side pain and squeeze risk; L/S ratio for DOGE shows high account ratio (1.32, crowded long) but low position ratio (0.86, short dominance), suggesting a potential long trap.
4. [Scenario Selection]: Chosen MEAN_REVERSION, as technical indicators (RSI near 60, weak ADX) and sentiment data (e.g., crowded long in DOGE) show overbought signs, with no strong trend-following signals, making reversal trading appropriate.

red_team_audit.zh: 【强制要求全中文】如果判断错误，最可能的反向理由是趋势延续：市场可能忽略超买信号继续上涨，特别是如果宏观情绪转向积极或鲸鱼流入增加。数据支撑包括：Qlib排名DOGE第一（尽管分数低），整体市场趋势看涨（价格高于SMA50），且空头爆仓可能引发轧空上涨。此外，ETH的提币囤货（236,612.3 ETH）可能预示积累，而非反转。
red_team_audit.en: Forced Contra-Argument: If the thesis is WRONG, the most likely reason is trend continuation: the market may ignore overbought signals and continue rising, especially if macro sentiment turns positive or whale inflows increase. Supporting data includes: Qlib ranking DOGE first (despite low score), overall market trend bullish (price above SMA50), and short liquidations could trigger squeeze rallies. Additionally, ETH's token withdrawal (236,612.3 ETH) may indicate accumulation, not reversal.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 【要求全中文】最明显的冲突信号是Qlib排名显示DOGE为最强资产（得分0.0162），这可能支持趋势跟随而非反转。此外，整体市场环境为看涨（价格高于SMA50），与反转剧本矛盾。我解释这些不会推翻结论，因为Qlib分数绝对值低，信号弱，且技术指标（如RSI、ADX）和拥挤交易（DOGE多头）更支持短期回调。
contrary_signal_check.en: List the most significant contrary signal or risk point and justify why it doesn't invalidate the trade: The main contrary signal is Qlib ranking DOGE as top asset (score 0.0162), which could support trend following over reversal. Also, the overall market environment is bullish (price above SMA50), conflicting with the reversal scenario. I justify that these don't invalidate the trade because the Qlib score is low in absolute terms (weak signal), and technical indicators (e.g., RSI, ADX) and crowded trades (DOGE long) better support a short-term pullback.

technical_signal.zh: 【全中文】1) 上/下影线比率：多数资产上影线较高（如BNB 60%、SOL 46%），显示上方抛压；下影线较低（如BTC 11%、BNB 8%），表明托底力度弱。2) RSI与ADX状态：RSI在56-60区间（中性偏强），ADX在15-25（趋势弱），如ETH ADX=15.6。3) 价格与均线偏离度：多数资产价格高于SMA50（偏离度+0.14%至+1.90%），如DOGE偏离+1.62%，显示超买风险。
technical_signal.en: 【IMPORTANT】Must explicitly mention: 1) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: High upper wicks (e.g., BNB 60%, SOL 46%) indicate selling pressure; low lower wicks (e.g., BTC 11%, BNB 8%) show weak support. 2) RSI & ADX status: RSI in 56-60 range (neutral-strong), ADX low 15-25 (weak trend), e.g., ETH ADX=15.6. 3) SMA deviation: Most assets above SMA50 (deviation +0.14% to +1.90%), e.g., DOGE +1.62%, showing overbought risk.

macro_onchain.zh: 【全中文】1) 过去24小时强平数据及多空强平比：BTC爆仓多空比0.42（空头痛苦），SOL 0.28（空头痛苦），DOGE 0.27（空头痛苦），ETH 1.29（多头痛苦）。2) 巨鲸资金净流入/流出：ETH代币净流入236,612.3 ETH（看涨），但稳定币净流出$8,183,823（看跌）；SOL代币净流出61,391.0 SOL（看跌），但稳定币净流入$95,623（看涨）。3) 当前资金费率状态：多数为正（如DOGE 0.0053%、BNB 0.0100%），显示多头情绪，但未达极端。
macro_onchain.en: 【IMPORTANT】Must explicitly mention: 1) 24h Liquidation Data & Long/Short Liquidation Ratio: BTC 0.42 (short pain), SOL 0.28 (short pain), DOGE 0.27 (short pain), ETH 1.29 (long pain). 2) Whale Net Inflow/Outflow: ETH token inflow 236,612.3 ETH (bullish) but stablecoin outflow $8,183,823 (bearish); SOL token outflow 61,391.0 SOL (bearish) but stablecoin inflow $95,623 (bullish). 3) Funding Rate: Mostly positive (e.g., DOGE 0.0053%, BNB 0.0100%), indicating long sentiment but not extreme.

quantitative_analysis.zh: 【全中文】Qlib排名靠前的币种为DOGE（得分0.0162）、BNB（0.0016）、BTC（0.0016），但分数绝对值低，显著性弱；量价偏差方面，资金费率Z-Score中SOL高达145.5160%（极端），显示多头过热，而ETH为-6.8046%（略负），未现显著异常。
quantitative_analysis.en: Analyze Qlib top-ranked coins and Z-Score significance: Qlib top coins are DOGE (score 0.0162), BNB (0.0016), BTC (0.0016), but low absolute scores indicate weak significance; in price-volume deviations, funding Z-Score for SOL is high at 145.5160% (extreme), showing overbought, while ETH is -6.8046% (slightly negative), no major anomalies.

regime_safety.zh: 【全中文必填】基于痛苦交易评估：1) RSI/ADX/NATR当前状态：RSI中性偏强，ADX弱，NATR中等（1.3-2.2%），波动正常。2) 上/下影线比率：上影线高表明抛压。3) 强平多空比：空头痛苦（BTC、SOL、DOGE），有轧空风险。4) 鲸鱼净流向：冲突（ETH提币但资金流出，SOL抛售但资金流入）。最终判断为‘安全均值回归’（SAFE_MR），因技术超买、情绪拥挤（如DOGE），且无强趋势证据，适合回调交易。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4B (Pain Trade): 1) RSI/ADX/NATR current state: RSI neutral-strong, ADX weak, NATR medium (1.3-2.2%), normal volatility. 2) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: High upper wicks indicate selling pressure. 3) Liquidation long/short ratio: Short pain (BTC, SOL, DOGE), squeeze risk. 4) Whale net flow direction: Conflicting (ETH withdrawal but outflow, SOL selling but inflow). Conclude with explicit verdict: SAFE_MR, as technical overbought, crowded sentiment (e.g., DOGE), and no strong trend evidence, suitable for pullback trading.

analysis_summary.zh:
1. [叙事校验]：当前市场驱动力为‘已定价’，无明显新冲动驱动。DOGE、BNB、BTC的Qlib排名靠前，但ETH和SOL的鲸鱼流向显示分歧，市场主旋律为中性震荡，等待方向突破。
2. [决策依据详情]：技术信号显示多数资产RSI在50-60区间，ADX低于25，趋势偏弱；鲸鱼数据中ETH有提币囤货但稳定币流出，SOL有充币抛售但稳定币流入，链上分歧明显；量化指标DOGE Qlib分数最高，但爆仓多空比低，显示空头风险小。
3. [痛苦交易]：DOGE和SOL的爆仓多空比分别为0.30和0.29，空头强平显著，但持仓L/S比显示多头略拥挤（如DOGE账户数比1.33），存在潜在多头挤压风险；ETH爆仓多空比1.27，多头受压，但鲸鱼提币可能缓解抛压。
4. [剧本选择]：选择TREND_FOLLOWING剧本，基于Qlib排名和中性技术面，跟随DOGE和BTC的相对强势，但避免极端仓位，因鲸鱼流向分歧和市场震荡。
analysis_summary.en:
1. [Narrative Validation]: The market driver is 'priced-in' with no clear new impulse. DOGE, BNB, and BTC rank high in Qlib, but ETH and SOL show divergent whale flows, indicating a neutral consolidation awaiting breakout.
2. [Decision Details]: Technical signals show RSI 50-60 and ADX <25 for most assets, suggesting weak trends; whale data reveals ETH token withdrawal but stablecoin outflow, SOL token deposit but stablecoin inflow, showing on-chain divergence; quant metrics highlight DOGE's top Qlib score but low liquidation ratio, indicating low short risk.
3. [Pain Trade]: DOGE and SOL have liquidation long/short ratios of 0.30 and 0.29, showing significant short liquidations, but L/S ratios indicate slightly crowded longs (e.g., DOGE account ratio 1.33), posing potential long squeeze risks; ETH ratio 1.27 suggests long pressure, but token withdrawal may ease selling.
4. [Scenario Selection]: Chosen TREND_FOLLOWING scenario, leveraging Qlib rankings and neutral technicals to follow DOGE and BTC strength, but with cautious sizing due to whale divergence and market volatility.

analysis_summary.zh:

4. [剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因为市场处于中性区域，技术指标未达极端，但强平数据和持仓比显示局部挤压机会（如BNB空头挤压），且鲸鱼流向分歧，适合反转交易以捕捉短期调整。

1. [Narrative Validation]: The current market driver is 'priced-in' with no clear new impulse. Overall market is neutral-bullish, but 1D shows BEAR state, indicating short-term correction pressure while long-term trend remains bullish. The main theme is choppy uptrend with caution for pullbacks.
2. [Decision Details]: Technical signals show most assets with RSI around 60 and weak ADX (17-25), suggesting moderate trend strength; Whale data shows ETH token withdrawal (positive 24h Token Flow) but stablecoin outflow, SOL token selling but stablecoin inflow, indicating divergence; Quantitative Qlib ranks DOGE first but score low (0.0181), overall signal strength insufficient.
3. [Pain Trade]: Liquidation data shows BTC, ETH, SOL, DOGE with liquidation long/short ratios below 1 (0.11-0.46), indicating more short liquidations and relative long safety, but BNB ratio is high at 10.96, showing significant short pressure and potential short squeeze risk. L/S ratios show DOGE with high account ratio (1.34, crowded long) but low volume ratio (0.88, more short positions), hinting at potential long trap.
4. [Scenario Selection]: Chosen MEAN_REVERSION scenario, as market is in neutral zone with no extreme technicals, but liquidation and L/S ratios show local squeeze opportunities (e.g., BNB short squeeze), and whale flow divergence favors reversal trades for short-term adjustments.

analysis_summary.zh:
1. [叙事校验]：当前市场驱动力为‘已定价’的温和上涨，缺乏新的冲动驱动。宏观环境（美联储利率稳定、DXY走弱）支持风险偏好，但价格已部分反映。市场主旋律为技术性反弹，而非基本面突破。
2. [决策依据详情]：技术信号显示多数资产RSI在60-63（中性偏强），ADX低（17-25）表明趋势弱，均线偏离度小（+0.8%至+3.2%）。链上数据：ETH有提币囤货（24h +303k ETH）但稳定币流出（-$1.9M），SOL有充币抛售（24h -61k SOL）但稳定币流入（+$83k）。量化指标：Qlib排名DOGE第一（分数0.0181），但整体分数低，动量温和。
3. [痛苦交易]：强平数据显示空头痛苦显著：BTC爆仓多空比0.16，ETH 0.14，DOGE 0.30，表明空头被挤压；BNB爆仓多空比23.29异常高，显示多头风险。持仓L/S比：DOGE大户账户数比1.37（多头拥挤），但持仓量比0.85（空头持仓重），暗示潜在多头陷阱。
4. [剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION，因技术指标（RSI中性、ADX低、均线偏离小）和情绪（资金费率近零、爆仓比极端）显示市场处于温和区间，缺乏强劲趋势。TREND_FOLLOWING被拒因动量不足（平均动量0.0286），MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE被拒因无明确拥挤侧（除DOGE外L/S比平衡）。
analysis_summary.en:
1. [Narrative Validation]: The current market driver is 'priced-in' mild uptrend, lacking new impulse. Macro environment (Fed rate stable, DXY weaker) supports risk-on, but price partially reflects it. The main theme is technical rebound, not fundamental breakout.
2. [Decision Details]: Technical signals show most assets RSI 60-63 (neutral-strong), ADX low (17-25) indicating weak trend, SMA deviation small (+0.8% to +3.2%). On-chain: ETH has token outflow (24h +303k ETH) but stablecoin outflow (-$1.9M), SOL has token inflow (24h -61k SOL) but stablecoin inflow (+$83k). Quantitative: Qlib ranks DOGE first (score 0.0181), but overall scores low, momentum mild.
3. [Pain Trade]: Liquidation data shows short pain significant: BTC liquidation ratio 0.16, ETH 0.14, DOGE 0.30, indicating short squeeze; BNB liquidation ratio 23.29 abnormally high, showing long risk. L/S Ratio: DOGE top trader account ratio 1.37 (long crowded) but position ratio 0.85 (short heavy), hinting potential long trap.
4. [Scenario Selection]: Chose MEAN_REVERSION, as technicals (RSI neutral, ADX low, SMA deviation small) and sentiment (funding near zero, extreme liquidation ratios) show market in mild range, lacking strong trend. TREND_FOLLOWING rejected due to insufficient momentum (avg 0.0286), MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE rejected due to no clear crowded side (L/S ratios balanced except DOGE).

red_team_audit.zh: 如果判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：市场可能突然获得新的利好驱动（如机构买入或宏观数据），推动价格突破当前区间，导致均值回归失败。数据支撑：ETH的提币囤货（+303k ETH）可能预示积累，若价格突破阻力，可能触发趋势跟随；DOGE的Qlib高分（0.0181）可能吸引资金流入，推高价格；全球宏观风险偏好（DXY走弱）可能持续支持上涨。
red_team_audit.en: If the thesis is WRONG, the most likely reason is: market might suddenly get new bullish catalysts (e.g., institutional buying or macro data), pushing price to break the current range, causing mean reversion to fail. Supporting data: ETH token outflow (+303k ETH) may indicate accumulation, if price breaks resistance, could trigger trend following; DOGE's high Qlib score (0.0181) may attract inflows, driving price up; global macro risk-on (DXY weaker) may sustain uptrend.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最明显的冲突信号：DOGE的Qlib排名第一（分数0.0181）和动量0.0358较高，可能支持趋势跟随。潜在风险点：ETH的提币囤货（24h +303k ETH）看涨，但稳定币流出（-$1.9M）看跌，流向矛盾。不会推翻结论的原因：DOGE的Qlib分数绝对值低（0.0181），且持仓L/S比显示多头陷阱风险；ETH的流向矛盾表明机构分歧，缺乏一致看涨信号，整体市场环境（ADX低、动量温和）仍支持区间震荡。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signal: DOGE ranks first in Qlib (score 0.0181) with momentum 0.0358 high, potentially supporting trend following. Risk point: ETH token outflow (24h +303k ETH) bullish but stablecoin outflow (-$1.9M) bearish, flow contradiction. Won't invalidate trade because: DOGE's Qlib score absolute low (0.0181), and L/S ratio shows long trap risk; ETH's flow contradiction indicates institutional divergence, lacking consistent bullish signal, overall market environment (ADX low, momentum mild) still supports range-bound.

technical_signal.zh: 1) 上/下影线比率：多数资产上影线低（BTC 4%, DOGE 7%, ETH 13%, SOL 33%），下影线为0%，表明抛压轻微但无强托底。2) RSI与ADX状态：RSI在60-63（中性偏强），ADX在17-25（趋势弱），显示震荡。3) 价格与均线偏离度：偏离度小（BNB +0.82%, BTC +1.40%, ETH +1.05%, SOL +3.20%, DOGE +2.57%），无极端超买。
technical_signal.en: 1) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: Most assets have low upper wicks (BTC 4%, DOGE 7%, ETH 13%, SOL 33%), lower wicks 0%, indicating mild selling pressure but no strong support. 2) RSI & ADX status: RSI 60-63 (neutral-strong), ADX 17-25 (trend weak), showing consolidation. 3) SMA deviation: Small (BNB +0.82%, BTC +1.40%, ETH +1.05%, SOL +3.20%, DOGE +2.57%), no extreme overbought.

macro_onchain.zh: 1) 过去24小时强平数据及多空强平比：BTC多单爆仓$1.74M/空单$11.02M（比0.16），ETH $1.66M/$11.66M（0.14），SOL $0.93M/$0.94M（0.99），BNB $33k/$1.4k（23.29），DOGE $272k/$902k（0.30）。2) 巨鲸资金净流入/流出：ETH代币净流出+303k ETH（看涨），稳定币净流出-$1.92M（看跌）；SOL代币净流入-61k SOL（看跌），稳定币净流入+$83k（看涨）。3) 当前资金费率状态：近零（ETH -0.0103%, BTC 0.0031%, SOL 0.0031%, BNB 0.0100%, DOGE 0.0033%），无极端。
macro_onchain.en: 1) 24h Liquidation Data & Long/Short Liquidation Ratio: BTC long $1.74M/short $11.02M (ratio 0.16), ETH $1.66M/$11.66M (0.14), SOL $0.93M/$0.94M (0.99), BNB $33k/$1.4k (23.29), DOGE $272k/$902k (0.30). 2) Whale Net Inflow/Outflow: ETH token outflow +303k ETH (bullish), stablecoin outflow -$1.92M (bearish); SOL token inflow -61k SOL (bearish), stablecoin inflow +$83k (bullish). 3) Funding Rate: Near zero (ETH -0.0103%, BTC 0.0031%, SOL 0.0031%, BNB 0.0100%, DOGE 0.0033%), no extremes.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：DOGE第一（分数0.0181），BNB第二（0.0035），BTC第三（0.0014），SOL和ETH负分（-0.0033）。分数显著性低，最高0.0181表示相对强度弱。量价偏差：资金费率Z-score无极端（ETH -194.99%负但费率低），波动率NATR中等（1.23%-2.39%）。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib ranking: DOGE first (score 0.0181), BNB second (0.0035), BTC third (0.0014), SOL and ETH negative (-0.0033). regime_safety.zh: 基于痛苦交易评估：1) RSI中性、ADX低、NATR中等，市场震荡。2) 上影线比率低、下影线0%，抛压轻但支撑弱。3) 爆仓多空比显示空头痛苦（BTC、ETH、DOGE低），BNB多头风险高。4) 鲸鱼流向矛盾（ETH提币但稳定币流出，SOL充币但稳定币流入）。结论：安全均值回归（SAFE_MR），因技术指标温和、情绪无极端、流动性陷阱风险低（除DOGE潜在多头陷阱），适合区间交易。

Verdict: SAFE_MR, as technicals mild, sentiment not extreme, liquidity trap risk low (except DOGE potential long trap), suitable for range trading.

analysis_summary.zh:
1. [叙事校验]：当前市场驱动力为‘已定价’状态，无明显新冲动驱动。BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB、DOGE均处于1D级别BEAR市场环境但长期趋势看涨，价格与SMA50偏离度较小（-0.06%至+2.31%），显示市场在消化前期涨幅后进入盘整。宏观背景中性（美联储利率稳定，美元指数走弱），VIX恐慌指数上升但未引发大规模抛售。
2. [决策依据详情]：技术信号显示多数资产RSI在55-63区间（中性偏强），ADX普遍低于25（趋势强度弱），上影线比率较高（18%-52%）暗示上方抛压。链上数据分化：ETH有24h代币提币囤货（+219k ETH）但7d为充币抛售（-7.8M ETH），稳定币流出（看跌）；SOL为持续充币抛售（-43.9k SOL 24h，-13.5M SOL 7d）但稳定币流入（看涨）。量化指标：Qlib排名前三为BNB、BTC、DOGE，分数均>0.003，但整体动量中等（avg_momentum_12=0.0232）。
3. [痛苦交易]：强平数据显示多空博弈激烈：BNB爆仓多空比高达20.38（空头痛苦显著），ETH、BTC、DOGE爆仓多空比低于0.5（多头痛苦显著），SOL为1.75（多头略占优）。持仓L/S比方面，BNB（0.95/0.86）和DOGE（1.31/0.85）显示大户账户偏多但持仓偏空，潜在轧空风险；ETH和BTC持仓均衡。整体市场处于‘盲目踩踏’阶段，多空双方均受强平压力。
4. [剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因技术面显示RSI中性偏高、上影线抛压明显，且强平数据揭示多空痛苦并存，价格在关键均线附近盘整，适合反转交易。TREND_FOLLOWING被拒绝因趋势强度弱（ADX低）且宏观环境BEAR；MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE被拒绝因无极端拥挤头寸或清晰轧空信号。
analysis_summary.en:
1. [Narrative Validation]: The market driver is 'priced-in' with no new impulse. BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB, DOGE are in 1D BEAR regime but long-term bullish, with small SMA50 deviations (-0.06% to +2.31%), indicating consolidation after prior gains. Macro context neutral (Fed rate stable, DXY weaker), VIX rising but no mass sell-off.

TREND_FOLLOWING rejected due to weak trend strength (low ADX) and BEAR macro; MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE rejected due to lack of extreme crowding or clear squeeze signals.

analysis_summary.zh:
1. [叙事校验]：当前市场驱动力为‘已定价’状态。QLib模型显示BNB、BTC、DOGE相对强势，但整体市场环境为BEAR（RSI_1D均低于55），宏观背景中性（美联储利率稳定，VIX高但DXY走弱）。没有突发新闻或重大数据发布，价格波动主要由技术面和存量资金博弈驱动，属于存量博弈阶段。
2. [决策依据详情]：技术信号上，各币种RSI_14处于中性偏强区间（55-63），ADX较弱（18-28），趋势强度一般；上影线比率普遍较高（ETH 64%、SOL 81%、BTC 65%），显示上方抛压存在。链上数据方面，ETH出现24h代币净提币（571,645.6 ETH）但7d为净充币，稳定币24h净流出，信号矛盾；SOL代币24h和7d均为净充币，稳定币净流入。量化指标上，QLib排名前三为BNB、BTC、DOGE，分数分别为0.0042、0.0034、0.0032，但绝对数值较低，信号强度一般。
3. [痛苦交易]：强平数据显示多空博弈激烈。BNB爆仓多空比高达28.54（空单几乎无爆仓），显示空头极度脆弱，可能面临轧空风险；ETH、BTC、DOGE爆仓多空比均低于0.5（0.35-0.45），显示多头正在承受痛苦，抛压可能衰竭。持仓L/S比方面，DOGE大户账户数比1.30（多头略拥挤），其他币种接近1，未出现极端拥挤。
4. [剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本。理由：市场处于BEAR环境但技术指标未超买，强平数据显示多头痛苦（ETH、BTC、DOGE爆仓多空比低），可能接近短期底部；同时，BNB空头脆弱，存在轧空机会。趋势跟随信号较弱（QLib分数低，ADX弱），微结构挤压机会仅在BNB明显。
analysis_summary.en:
1. [Narrative Validation]: The current market driver is 'priced-in'. QLib model shows BNB, BTC, DOGE with relative strength, but overall market environment is BEAR (RSI_1D all below 55), macro background neutral (Fed rate stable, VIX high but DXY weakening). No breaking news or major data releases, price movements driven by technicals and existing capital flows, indicating a phase of存量博弈 (stock game).
2. [Decision Details]: Technically, RSI_14 across coins is in neutral-strong range (55-63), ADX weak (18-28), trend strength modest; upper wick ratios are generally high (ETH 64%, SOL 81%, BTC 65%), indicating selling pressure above. On-chain: ETH shows 24h token net withdrawal (571,645.6 ETH) but 7d net deposit, stablecoin net outflow, signals contradictory; SOL token net deposit both 24h and 7d, stablecoin net inflow. Quantitatively, QLib top ranks are BNB, BTC, DOGE with scores 0.0042, 0.0034, 0.0032, but absolute values low, signal strength modest.
3. [Pain Trade]: Liquidation data shows intense long-short battle. BNB liquidation long/short ratio is extremely high at 28.54 (almost no short liquidations), indicating shorts are vulnerable and squeeze risk; ETH, BTC, DOGE have ratios below 0.5 (0.35-0.45), showing longs are suffering, selling pressure may be exhausting. L/S ratios: DOGE大户账户数比 at 1.30 (longs slightly crowded), others near 1, no extreme crowding.
4. [Scenario Selection]: Chose MEAN_REVERSION scenario. Reason: Market in BEAR environment but technicals not overbought, liquidation data shows long pain (low ratios for ETH, BTC, DOGE), suggesting potential short-term bottom; simultaneously, BNB shorts vulnerable, squeeze opportunity exists. Trend-following signals weak (low QLib scores, weak ADX), microstructure squeeze only clear for BNB.

red_team_audit.zh: 【强制要求全中文】如果判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：市场延续BEAR趋势，技术性反弹失败。支撑反面结论的数据包括：1) 整体市场环境为BEAR（RSI_1D低于55），可能继续下行；2) ETH和SOL的鲸鱼代币流向矛盾（ETH 24h提币但7d充币，SOL持续充币），显示机构可能仍在减持；3) QLib分数绝对值低（最高0.0042），预测信号弱；4) 上影线比率高，表明每次上涨都遭遇抛售，反弹动力不足。
red_team_audit.en: Forced Contra-Argument: If the thesis is WRONG, the most likely reason is the market continues its BEAR trend, technical rebound fails. Data supporting opposite view: 1) Overall market environment is BEAR (RSI_1D below 55), could decline further; 2) Whale token flows for ETH and SOL are contradictory (ETH 24h withdrawal but 7d deposit, SOL continuous deposit), suggesting institutions may still be selling; 3) QLib scores are low in absolute value (max 0.0042), weak predictive signal; 4) High upper wick ratios indicate selling on rallies, rebound momentum lacking.

contrary_signal_check.en: List the most significant contrary signal or risk point and justify why it doesn't invalidate the trade: The most obvious conflict is contradictory whale flows for ETH (24h withdrawal bullish vs 7d deposit bearish) and SOL's continuous token deposit (bearish). Risk is overall BEAR market may suppress rebound. They don't invalidate because: 1) Liquidation data shows long pain nearing exhaustion, could trigger technical rebound; 2) BNB short vulnerability offers hedge opportunity; 3) Using small position sizes and strict stop-loss to manage risk.

regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Pain Trade: 1) RSI/ADX/NATR state: RSI neutral, ADX weak, NATR medium (1.34-2.46%), volatility manageable; 2) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: high upper wicks show selling pressure, low lower wicks weak support; 3) Liquidation long/short ratio: BNB 28.54 (shorts vulnerable), ETH/BTC/DOGE 0.35-0.45 (longs suffering); 4) Whale net flow: signals contradictory. 1. [叙事校验]：当前市场驱动力为‘已定价’状态，无明显新冲动驱动。BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB、DOGE均处于1D级别BEAR市场环境，但长期趋势看涨，价格普遍高于SMA50，显示市场在消化前期涨幅后进入盘整。宏观背景中性（美联储利率稳定，美元指数走弱），风险偏好一般（VIX高企），市场主旋律为震荡调整。
2. [决策依据详情]：技术信号显示多数资产RSI在57-64区间（中性偏强），ADX普遍低于25（趋势弱），上影线比率较高（如SOL 41%、BNB 31%）暗示上方抛压。链上数据：ETH 24h代币净流入36万ETH（提币囤货看涨），但7d净流出797万ETH（充币抛售看跌），稳定币24h净流出157万美元（资金离场看跌）；SOL 24h代币净流出3.5万SOL（充币抛售看跌），稳定币净流入10.5万美元（准备抄底看涨）。量化指标：Qlib排名前二为BNB（得分0.0012）和BTC（得分0.001），但分数绝对值低，信号弱；DOGE资金费率Z-Score 98.97%极高，显示多头拥挤风险。
3. [痛苦交易]：强平数据显示多空比普遍低于1（如BTC 0.45、ETH 0.34、DOGE 0.35），表明空头爆仓更多，多头相对安全；但BNB多空比27.48极高，显示空头极度受压，潜在轧空风险。持仓L/S比：DOGE大户账户数比1.29（多头拥挤），BNB持仓量比0.86（空头略占优）。综合看，市场处于‘动能衰竭’阶段，无显著盲目踩踏。
4. [剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本。理由：技术面RSI中性偏高但ADX弱，上影线显示抛压；链上数据矛盾（如ETH 24h vs 7d流向相反）；Qlib分数低；强平多空比低暗示空头已部分清理。趋势跟随剧本因动量不足被拒；轧空剧本仅BNB有迹象但其他资产不支持，被拒。
analysis_summary.en:
1. [Narrative Validation]: The market driver is 'Priced-in' with no clear new impulse. BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB, DOGE are in 1D BEAR regime but long-term bullish, prices above SMA50, indicating consolidation after prior gains. Macro context neutral (Fed rate stable, DXY weaker), risk appetite moderate (VIX high), main theme is range-bound adjustment.
2. [Decision Details]: Technicals show RSI 57-64 (neutral-strong), ADX mostly below 25 (weak trend), high upper wick ratios (e.g., SOL 41%, BNB 31%) suggest selling pressure. On-chain: ETH 24h token net inflow 360k ETH (withdrawal bullish) but 7d net outflow 7.97M ETH (deposit bearish), stablecoin 24h net outflow $1.57M (funds leaving bearish); SOL 24h token net outflow 35k SOL (deposit bearish), stablecoin net inflow $105k (preparing to buy bullish). Quant: Qlib top ranks BNB (score 0.0012) and BTC (score 0.001) but low absolute scores, weak signal; DOGE funding Z-Score 98.97% extremely high, indicating crowded long risk.
3. [Pain Trade]: Liquidation ratios mostly below 1 (e.g., BTC 0.45, ETH 0.34, DOGE 0.35), meaning more short liquidations, longs relatively safe; but BNB ratio 27.48 extremely high, showing shorts heavily pressured, potential squeeze risk. L/S Ratios: DOGE account ratio 1.29 (crowded long), BNB position ratio 0.86 (slight short bias). Overall, market in 'momentum exhaustion' phase, no significant blind stampede.
4. [Scenario Selection]: Chose MEAN_REVERSION scenario. Reason: Technicals show neutral-high RSI but weak ADX, upper wicks indicate selling pressure; on-chain data contradictory (e.g., ETH 24h vs 7d flows opposite); Qlib scores low; low liquidation ratios suggest shorts already flushed. Trend Following rejected due to lack of momentum; Squeeze scenario only BNB hints but others not supportive, rejected.

red_team_audit.zh: 【强制要求全中文】如果判断错误，最可能的反向理由是市场突然出现新冲动驱动（如宏观利好或鲸鱼大额买入），推动价格突破盘整区间。支撑反面结论的数据：1) Qlib排名显示BNB和BTC相对强势，可能引领上涨；2) ETH 24h代币净流入36万ETH（提币囤货）看涨信号；3) 多数资产价格高于SMA50，长期趋势看涨；4) 稳定币流入SOL（10.5万美元）准备抄底。这些可能表明调整结束，趋势恢复向上。
red_team_audit.en: Forced Contra-Argument: If the thesis is WRONG, the most likely reason is a sudden new impulse driver (e.g., macro positive news or whale large buys) pushing prices out of consolidation. Data supporting opposite view: 1) Qlib ranks show BNB and BTC relatively strong, could lead rally; 2) ETH 24h token net inflow 360k ETH (withdrawal) bullish signal; 3) Most assets price above SMA50, long-term bullish trend; 4) Stablecoin inflow to SOL ($105k) preparing to buy. These may indicate adjustment over and trend resuming upward.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 【要求全中文】目前最明显的冲突信号：1) BNB多空强平比27.48极高，显示空头极度受压，可能引发轧空上涨，这与均值回归看跌冲突；2) DOGE资金费率Z-Score 98.97%极高，但价格仍在上涨，显示多头强劲。解释：BNB强平比异常但持仓量比0.86空头略占优，且技术面RSI 57.7、上影线31%显示阻力，轧空可能有限；DOGE多头拥挤但RSI 63.7接近超买，且强平多空比0.35低，空头已清理，上涨动能可能衰竭。因此不推翻交易结论。
contrary_signal_check.en: List the most significant contrary signal or risk point and justify why it doesn't invalidate the trade: 1) BNB liquidation ratio 27.48 extremely high, indicating shorts heavily pressured, potential squeeze conflict with mean reversion bearish view; 2) DOGE funding Z-Score 98.97% extremely high but price still rising, showing strong longs. Justification: BNB ratio anomaly but position ratio 0.86 slight short bias, and technicals RSI 57.7, upper wick 31% show resistance, squeeze likely limited; DOGE crowded long but RSI 63.7 near overbought, and liquidation ratio 0.35 low, shorts already flushed, upward momentum may exhaust. Thus not invalidating conclusion.

analysis_summary.zh:
1. [叙事校验]：当前市场驱动力为‘已定价’状态，无明显新叙事驱动。BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB、DOGE均处于1D级别BEAR市场环境，但长期趋势看涨，显示市场在消化前期涨幅后进入盘整。价格与宏观数据（美联储利率稳定、美元指数走弱）未出现明显背离，市场情绪中性偏谨慎。
2. [决策依据详情]：技术信号上，各币种RSI（14）在54-61区间，ADX普遍低于30，显示趋势动能偏弱；上影线比率较高（如BTC 51%、ETH 62%），表明上方抛压存在。链上数据方面，ETH出现24h内巨鲸提币53万ETH（看涨信号），但稳定币净流出176万美元（看跌信号），SOL则呈现代币净抛售3.5万SOL（看跌）但稳定币净流入13.7万美元（看涨）的矛盾。量化指标上，Qlib排名DOGE第一（得分0.0172），但DOGE资金费率Z-Score高达98.97%，显示多头拥挤风险。
3. [痛苦交易]：强平数据显示，BTC、ETH、DOGE的爆仓多空比分别为0.45、0.34、0.37，空头爆仓远多于多头，表明空头正承受痛苦，存在轧空风险；BNB爆仓多空比高达29.38，显示空头几乎被完全挤压，但持仓L/S比（账户数0.91/持仓量0.86）显示多头略占优，可能形成‘多头陷阱’。SOL爆仓多空比1.49，多头爆仓多于空头，结合持仓L/S比（账户数1.15/持仓量0.95），显示散户多头拥挤，有回调压力。
4. [剧本选择]：选择‘MEAN_REVERSION’剧本。理由：多个币种出现极端情绪指标（如DOGE资金费率Z-Score 98.97%、BNB爆仓多空比29.38），价格在盘整区间上沿遇阻（上影线比率高），且Qlib排名靠前的DOGE存在多头拥挤风险，适合进行反向交易。未选‘TREND_FOLLOWING’因趋势动能不足（ADX低），未选‘MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE’因当前强平数据未显示明确单边挤压信号。
analysis_summary.en:
1. [Narrative Validation]: The current market driver is 'priced-in', with no significant new narratives. BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB, and DOGE are in a 1D BEAR market environment but with long-term bullish trends, indicating consolidation after previous gains. Price and macro data (stable Fed rate, weaker DXY) show no clear divergence, with neutral to cautious sentiment.
2. [Decision Details]: Technically, RSI(14) ranges 54-61 and ADX is generally below 30, suggesting weak trend momentum; high upper wick ratios (e.g., BTC 51%, ETH 62%) indicate selling pressure. On-chain, ETH shows 24h whale token withdrawal of 530k ETH (bullish) but stablecoin outflow of $1.76M (bearish), while SOL has token net selling of 35k SOL (bearish) but stablecoin inflow of $137k (bullish). Quantitatively, Qlib ranks DOGE first (score 0.0172), but its funding Z-Score is 98.97%, indicating crowded long risk.
3. [Pain Trade]: Liquidation data shows BTC, ETH, and DOGE have long/short liquidation ratios of 0.45, 0.34, and 0.37, respectively, with short-side pain dominant, suggesting squeeze risk; BNB's ratio is 29.38, indicating extreme short squeeze, but L/S ratios (accounts 0.91/position 0.86) show slight long bias, potentially a 'long trap'. SOL's ratio is 1.49 with more long liquidations, combined with L/S ratios (accounts 1.15/position 0.95), indicating crowded retail longs and pullback pressure.
4. [Scenario Selection]: Chose 'MEAN_REVERSION' scenario. Reason: Multiple coins show extreme sentiment indicators (e.g., DOGE funding Z-Score 98.97%, BNB liquidation ratio 29.38), price faces resistance at range highs (high upper wick ratios), and top Qlib-ranked DOGE has crowded long risk, favoring contrarian trades. Rejected 'TREND_FOLLOWING' due to weak momentum (low ADX), and 'MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE' as liquidation data lacks clear one-sided squeeze signals.

red_team_audit.zh: 【强制要求全中文】如果判断错误，最可能的反向理由是市场情绪突然转向乐观，推动价格突破盘整区间。支撑反面结论的数据包括：1) 长期趋势看涨（各币种价格高于SMA50），可能吸引买盘；2) ETH巨鲸24h提币53万ETH，显示积累意图；3) 全球宏观风险偏好上升（美元指数走弱、VIX高但未恶化）。这些因素若结合积极新闻，可能引发轧空上涨，使均值回归策略失效。
red_team_audit.en: Forced Contra-Argument: If the thesis is WRONG, the most likely reason is a sudden shift to optimistic market sentiment, driving price breakouts from consolidation. Data supporting the opposite view includes: 1) Long-term bullish trends (prices above SMA50 for all coins) may attract buying; 2) ETH whale withdrawal of 530k ETH in 24h indicates accumulation intent; 3) Global macro risk-on sentiment (weaker DXY, high but not worsening VIX). Combined with positive news, this could trigger squeeze rallies, invalidating mean reversion.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 【要求全中文】当前最明显的冲突信号是ETH的巨鲸代币流向（24h净提币53万ETH，看涨）与稳定币流向（24h净流出176万美元，看跌）的矛盾。这不会推翻交易结论，因为：1) 稳定币流出可能反映短期获利了结或资金轮动，而非长期看跌；2) 技术面显示ETH上影线比率62%，抛压显著，价格在2160附近遇阻；3) 整体市场环境为BEAR，限制了上涨动能。因此，矛盾信号更可能加剧盘整，而非驱动趋势突破。
contrary_signal_check.en: List the most significant contrary signal or risk point and justify why it doesn't invalidate the trade: The most obvious conflict is ETH's whale token flow (24h net withdrawal 530k ETH, bullish) vs. stablecoin flow (24h net outflow $1.76M, bearish). This doesn't invalidate the trade because: 1) Stablecoin outflow may reflect short-term profit-taking or capital rotation, not long-term bearishness; 2) Technically, ETH has a 62% upper wick ratio, indicating strong selling pressure and resistance near $2160; 3) The overall market environment is BEAR, limiting upside momentum. Thus, conflicting signals are more likely to prolong consolidation than drive a breakout.

original_invalidation_rule.zh: 若价格突破$92.5以上并站稳，或鲸鱼代币流向转为净流入（看涨），则空头论点失效，应立即离场。
original_invalidation_rule.en: If price breaks above $92.5 and holds, or whale token flow reverses to net inflow (bullish), the short thesis is invalidated, exit immediately.

analysis_summary.zh:
1. [叙事校验]：当前市场驱动力为‘已定价’状态。QLib模型显示DOGE、BNB、BTC排名前三，但技术面普遍处于中性偏弱（RSI 54-58，ADX 17-28），无显著冲动驱动。宏观背景（美联储利率稳定、DXY走弱）提供风险偏好支持，但价格反应平淡，表明利好可能已消化。
2. [决策依据详情]：技术信号显示多数资产RSI中性（54-58），ADX偏弱（<25），上/下影线比率指示抛压（如BTC上影线69%）或托底（如DOGE下影线64%）不均。链上数据：ETH鲸鱼24h代币净流出（看涨）但稳定币净流出（看跌），SOL代币持续净流入（看跌）；爆仓多空比显示BNB（29.57）和SOL（2.86）多头受压，BTC（0.68）、ETH（0.57）、DOGE（0.74）空头受压。量化指标：QLib分数DOGE最高（0.0172），但资金费率Z-Score极高（DOGE 98.97%），暗示过热风险。
3. [痛苦交易]：持仓L/S比显示DOGE大户账户多空比1.44（多头拥挤），BNB持仓量比0.86（空头略多）。爆仓分布：BNB和SOL多头强平显著（爆仓多空比>2），可能引发多头挤压；BTC、ETH、DOGE空头强平更多，存在空头轧空潜力。当前市场处于‘盲目踩踏’边缘，拥挤头寸（如DOGE多头）面临回调风险。
4. [剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本。理由：多个资产出现极端信号（如DOGE资金费率Z-Score 98.97%、BNB爆仓多空比29.57），价格与数据背离（如SOL代币净流入但价格涨），技术面中性无趋势动能，适合反转交易。TREND_FOLLOWING被拒因动量不足（平均动量0.0487），MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE被拒因无明确流动性事件。
analysis_summary.en:
1. [Narrative Validation]: Current market drivers are 'priced-in'. QLib model ranks DOGE, BNB, BTC top, but technicals are neutral-weak (RSI 54-58, ADX 17-28) with no clear impulse. Macro context (stable Fed rates, weaker DXY) supports risk-on, but price action is muted, suggesting benefits may be digested.
2. [Decision Details]: Technicals show neutral RSI (54-58), weak ADX (<25), and uneven wick ratios (e.g., BTC upper wick 69% indicates selling pressure, DOGE lower wick 64% indicates support). On-chain: ETH whale token outflow (bullish) but stablecoin outflow (bearish), SOL token inflow (bearish); liquidation ratios show BNB (29.57) and SOL (2.86) with long pressure, BTC (0.68), ETH (0.57), DOGE (0.74) with short pressure. Quantitative: QLib score highest for DOGE (0.0172), but funding Z-Score extreme (DOGE 98.97%), suggesting overheating.
3. [Pain Trade]: L/S ratios show DOGE大户账户多空比1.44 (crowded long), BNB持仓量比0.86 (slight short bias). Liquidations: BNB and SOL have high long liquidation ratios (>2), risking long squeezes; BTC, ETH, DOGE have more short liquidations, offering short squeeze potential. Market is near 'blind stampede', with crowded positions (e.g., DOGE long) at risk of reversal.
4. [Scenario Selection]: Chosen MEAN_REVERSION scenario. Reason: Multiple assets show extremes (e.g., DOGE funding Z-Score 98.97%, BNB liquidation ratio 29.57), price-data divergence (e.g., SOL token inflow but price up), and neutral technicals lack trend momentum, favoring reversals. TREND_FOLLOWING rejected due to weak momentum (avg 0.0487), MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE rejected due to no clear liquidity event.

red_team_audit.zh: 【强制要求全中文】如果我的判断错误，最可能的原因是：1) QLib模型预测准确，DOGE等排名靠前资产继续上涨，忽略过热信号；2) 鲸鱼数据滞后或噪声，如ETH代币流出可能只是短期调整而非看涨；3) 宏观风险偏好突然增强（如VIX下降），推动市场突破中性区间。支撑反面结论的数据：DOGE QLib分数0.0172显著高于其他，技术面RSI 57和动量0.0536显示上涨动能，爆仓多空比0.74指示空头痛苦可能引发轧空。
red_team_audit.en: Forced Contra-Argument: If my thesis is WRONG, the most likely reasons are: 1) QLib model is accurate, with top-ranked assets like DOGE continuing upward despite overheat signals; 2) Whale data is lagging or noisy, e.g., ETH token outflow could be short-term adjustment not bullish; 3) Macro risk appetite suddenly improves (e.g., VIX drop), pushing markets above neutral ranges. Data supporting opposite view: DOGE QLib score 0.0172 is significantly higher, technicals show RSI 57 and momentum 0.0536 indicating upward momentum, liquidation ratio 0.74 suggests short pain could trigger squeeze.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 【要求全中文】最明显的冲突信号：1) DOGE QLib排名第一且分数高，暗示强势；2) 市场整体趋势看涨（价格高于SMA50）。解释：QLib分数可能已反映短期超买，高资金费率Z-Score（98.97%）增加回调概率；看涨趋势但ADX弱（<25）和RSI中性表明动能不足，均值回归风险上升。
contrary_signal_check.en: List the most significant contrary signal or risk point and justify why it doesn't invalidate the trade: 1) DOGE ranks #1 in QLib with high score, suggesting strength; 2) Overall market trend is bullish (price > SMA50). Justification: QLib score may already price in short-term overbought conditions, high funding Z-Score (98.97%) increases reversal odds; bullish trend but weak ADX (<25) and neutral RSI indicate lack of momentum, raising mean reversion risk.

technical_signal.zh: 【全中文】1) 上/下影线比率：BTC上影线69%表明抛压强，DOGE下影线64%表明托底力；2) RSI与ADX状态：多数资产RSI 54-58（中性），ADX 17-28（趋势弱）；3) 价格与均线偏离度：ETH偏离SMA50 -0.48%（略低），SOL偏离+1.71%（略高），整体偏离小。
technical_signal.en: 【IMPORTANT】Must explicitly mention: 1) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: BTC upper wick 69% indicates selling pressure, DOGE lower wick 64% indicates support; 2) RSI & ADX status: Most assets RSI 54-58 (neutral), ADX 17-28 (weak trend); 3) SMA deviation: ETH deviates -0.48% from SMA50 (slightly below), SOL deviates +1.71% (slightly above), overall deviations small.

quantitative_analysis.zh: 【全中文】QLib排名：DOGE（0.0172）、BNB（0.0033）、BTC（0.0014）靠前，但DOGE资金费率Z-Score 98.9747%极高，量价偏差显著；平均动量0.0487偏低，量化信号混合。
quantitative_analysis.en: Analyze Qlib top-ranked coins and Z-Score significance: QLib ranks: DOGE (0.0172), BNB (0.0033), BTC (0.0014) top, but DOGE funding Z-Score 98.9747% is extreme, indicating statistical deviation; avg momentum 0.0487 is low, quant signals mixed.

regime_safety.zh: 【全中文必填】基于痛苦交易评估：1) RSI/ADX/NATR状态：RSI中性，ADX弱，NATR中等（1.3-2.5%）；2) 上/下影线比率：不均，指示局部压力；3) 强平多空比：BNB和SOL多头受压，其他空头受压；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH和SOL流向矛盾。结论：‘安全均值回归’（SAFE_MR）。依据：无极端超买超卖（RSI<60），强平分布提供反转燃料，鲸鱼数据无一致轧空信号，适合捕捉回调。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4B (Pain Trade): 1) RSI/ADX/NATR: RSI neutral, ADX weak, NATR medium (1.3-2.5%); 2) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: uneven, indicating local pressure; 3) Liquidation long/short ratio: BNB and SOL long pressure, others short pressure; 4) Whale net flow: contradictory for ETH and SOL. Verdict: SAFE_MR. Reason: No extreme overbought/oversold (RSI<60), liquidation distribution offers reversal fuel, whale data shows no clear squeeze signal, suitable for catching pullbacks.
